---
title: "Combined SV characterization"
output: github_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(cowplot)
library(knitr)
library(vcfR)
library(janitor)
library(ggupset)
library(ggh4x)
library(patchwork)
library(plyranges)
## genome sizes
genome_size_table <- tibble(species=c("bonobo", "chimpanzee", "human"),
                            genome_size=c(3244888708,3177739762,3117275501))
## HPRC metadata
hprc_pop_order <- c("GWD", "ACB", "MSL", "YRI", "ESN", "MKK-HapMap", "ASW",
                    "PUR", "CLM", "PEL",
                    "CHS", "KHV", "PJL", "Chinese-GIAB", 
                    "Ashkenazim Jewish-GIAB")
hprc_metadata <- read_tsv("../docs/HPRC_metadata.txt") %>%
  janitor::clean_names() %>%
  mutate(hprc_meta_population=fct_relevel(hprc_meta_population, hprc_pop_order)) %>%
  distinct(id, hprc_meta_population, hprc_panpan_color)
hprc_color <- count(hprc_metadata, hprc_meta_population, hprc_panpan_color) %>%
  arrange(hprc_meta_population) %>%
  pull(hprc_panpan_color)
## Panpan metadata
panpan_sample_id <- read_tsv("../docs/sample_table_combined.tsv") %>%
  pull(sample_id)
panpan_metadata <- read_tsv("../docs/PanPan_Metadata_updated.txt") %>%
  janitor::clean_names() %>%
  distinct(genome_name, species, species_code, common_name, new_name) %>%
  mutate(species_code=ifelse(species_code=="unknown" & genome_name %in% c("AG05253_1"), "Ppan", species_code),
         species_code=ifelse(species_code=="unknown" & genome_name %in% c("AG18356_6", "AG16618_12"), "Ptv x Ptt", species_code),
         species_code=ifelse(species_code=="unknown", "Ptv", species_code)) %>%
  mutate(common_name=ifelse(is.na(common_name) & genome_name %in% c("AG05253_1"), "Bonobo", common_name),
         common_name=ifelse(is.na(common_name) & genome_name %in% c("AG18356_6", "AG16618_12"), "Western x Central hybrid", common_name),
         common_name=ifelse(is.na(common_name), "Western chimpanzee", common_name)) %>%
  filter(genome_name %in% panpan_sample_id) %>%
  distinct(genome_name, common_name)
panpan_color <- c('#4c5d4c','#ffb35a', '#9dced9', '#bbc671', "darkgrey")
```

## Cancatenate vcf files

#### Concatenate vcf files across callers

```{bash eval=FALSE}
## test, the followings have all been implemented in Snakemake but the output were stored in the truvari directory. I got confused and ran these code again, so the output files are duplicated but identical.
conda activate bcftools
cd /global/scratch/users/nicolas931010/sv_detection
mkdir concat_vcf
mkdir concat_vcf/mPanTro3
mkdir concat_vcf/ht2t
mkdir concat_vcf/mPanPan1

bcftools concat -a truvari/mPanTro3/panpan-pt.svimasm.consensus.vcf.gz truvari/mPanTro3/panpan-pt.svimasm.only.vcf.gz truvari/mPanTro3/panpan-pt.sniffles.only.vcf.gz | bgzip > concat_vcf/mPanTro3/panpan-pt.concat.vcf.gz
bcftools concat -a truvari/mPanPan1/panpan-pp.svimasm.consensus.vcf.gz truvari/mPanPan1/panpan-pp.svimasm.only.vcf.gz truvari/mPanPan1/panpan-pp.sniffles.only.vcf.gz | bgzip > concat_vcf/mPanPan1/panpan-pp.concat.vcf.gz
bcftools concat -a truvari/ht2t/hprc.svimasm.consensus.vcf.gz truvari/ht2t/hprc.svimasm.only.vcf.gz truvari/ht2t/hprc.sniffles.only.vcf.gz | bgzip > concat_vcf/ht2t/hprc.concat.vcf.gz


for FILE in `ls concat_vcf/*/*.concat.vcf.gz`; do
bcftools index $FILE
done
```

#### liftover chimp vcf

```{r eval=FALSE}
## First, check whether there are SVs spanning the two bases that are different between the two mPanTro3 versions. there doesn't appear to be anything
vcf_long_chimp_tmp <- vcf_long
vcf_long_chimp_tmp %>%
  mutate(end_from_svlen=ifelse(svtype=="INS", pos, pos+svlen)) %>%
  mutate(end=ifelse(!is.na(end), end, end_from_svlen)) %>%
  distinct(id, chrom, pos, end) %>%
  filter((chrom=="chr15_hap1_hsa14" & pos <= 2711420 & end >= 2711420) | (chrom=="chr23_hap1_hsa22" & pos <= 2222408 & end >= 2222408))
# samtools faidx  /global/scratch/users/joana_rocha/PANPAN/reference/primates_T2T/mPanTro3/mPanTro3.pri.cur.20231122.fasta chr15_hap1_hsa14:2711420-2711420
```

```{bash eval=FALSE}
## Use a combination of bcftools and awk to subtract 1 to pos and END info tag for SVs past the deleted N
conda activate bcftools 
cd /global/scratch/users/nicolas931010/sv_detection

bcftools view truvari/mPanTro3/panpan-pt.concat.vcf.gz -h > truvari/mPanTro3/lifted_panpan-pt.concat.vcf
bcftools view truvari/mPanTro3/panpan-pt.concat.vcf.gz -H | \
awk -F'\t' '
BEGIN { OFS = FS }
$1 == "chr15_hap1_hsa14" && $2 > 2711420 {
$2 -= 1
sub(/END=[0-9]+/, "END=" gensub(/^.*END=([0-9]+).*$/, "\\1", "g", $8)-1, $8)
}
$1 == "chr23_hap1_hsa22" && $2 > 2222408 {
$2 -= 1
sub(/END=[0-9]+/, "END=" gensub(/^.*END=([0-9]+).*$/, "\\1", "g", $8)-1, $8)
}
{ print }' >> truvari/mPanTro3/lifted_panpan-pt.concat.vcf

bgzip truvari/mPanTro3/lifted_panpan-pt.concat.vcf
bcftools index truvari/mPanTro3/lifted_panpan-pt.concat.vcf.gz

## Sanity check (the first pair should be the same. the second pair should be shifted by 1bp, with the lifted version having smaller numbers)
bcftools view -r chr15_hap1_hsa14:0-2711420 truvari/mPanTro3/panpan-pt.concat.vcf.gz -H | tail -n 1
bcftools view -r chr15_hap1_hsa14:0-2711420 truvari/mPanTro3/lifted_panpan-pt.concat.vcf.gz -H | tail -n 1

bcftools view -r chr15_hap1_hsa14:2711420- truvari/mPanTro3/panpan-pt.concat.vcf.gz -H | head -n 2 | tail -n 1
bcftools view -r chr15_hap1_hsa14:2711420- truvari/mPanTro3/lifted_panpan-pt.concat.vcf.gz -H | head -n 2 | tail -n 1
```

```{bash eval=FALSE}
### Bcftools liftover. This method has complications and we choose not to use it
cd /global/scratch/users/nicolas931010/sv_detection
export BCFTOOLS_PLUGINS=/global/scratch/users/joana_rocha/software/bcftools-1.20/plugins/
/global/scratch/users/joana_rocha/software/bcftools-1.20/bcftools +fill-tags truvari/mPanTro3/panpan-pt.concat.vcf.gz -t AC |

/global/scratch/users/joana_rocha/software/bcftools-1.20/bcftools annotate truvari/mPanTro3/panpan-pt.concat.vcf.gz --remove INFO/AC,INFO/AF |
/global/scratch/users/joana_rocha/software/bcftools-1.20/bcftools norm -c s -f /global/scratch/users/joana_rocha/PANPAN/reference/primates_T2T/mPanTro3/mPanTro3.pri.cur.20231031.fasta -- |
#/global/scratch/users/joana_rocha/software/bcftools-1.20/bcftools view -H | head -n 4 | tail -n 1
#/global/scratch/users/joana_rocha/software/bcftools-1.20/bcftools +fill-tags -t AC -- |
/global/scratch/users/joana_rocha/software/bcftools-1.20/bcftools +liftover -Oz -o truvari/mPanTro3/lifted_panpan-pt.concat.vcf.gz -- \
-s /global/scratch/users/joana_rocha/PANPAN/reference/primates_T2T/mPanTro3/mPanTro3.pri.cur.20231031.fasta \
-f /global/scratch/users/joana_rocha/PANPAN/reference/primates_T2T/mPanTro3/mPanTro3.pri.cur.20231122.fasta \
-c /global/scratch/users/joana_rocha/PANPAN/reference/primates_T2T/mPanTro3/pafs_ref_debug/thanksgiving_halloween.chain &> truvari/mPanTro3/lifted_panpan-pt.log
```



#### Concatenate vcf with Scott's

```{bash eval=FALSE}
## concat with Scott's. These were run manually
conda activate bcftools
cd /global/scratch/users/nicolas931010/software/apptainer
apptainer pull docker://griffithlab/vatools
cd /global/scratch/users/nicolas931010/sv_detection

#apptainer exec /global/scratch/users/nicolas931010/software/apptainer/vatools_latest.sif vcf-genotype-annotator -o concat_vcf/mPanTro3/final3~mPanTro3.tmp.vcf /global/scratch/users/scott_ferguson/panpan/finished_vcf/final3~mPanTro3.vcf AG18354_5 .
## I misnamed final4 as final3, but it's not a problem since the correct input file from Scott was used
echo "mPanTro3 AG18354_5" > concat_vcf/mPanTro3/panpan-pt.sample_to_rename.txt
bcftools query -l truvari/mPanTro3/panpan-pt.concat.vcf.gz  > concat_vcf/mPanTro3/panpan-pt.samples.txt
bcftools reheader -s concat_vcf/mPanTro3/panpan-pt.sample_to_rename.txt /global/scratch/users/scott_ferguson/panpan/finished_vcf/final4~mPanTro3.vcf | bcftools view -S concat_vcf/mPanTro3/panpan-pt.samples.txt | bcftools sort | bgzip > concat_vcf/mPanTro3/final3~mPanTro3.vcf.gz
bcftools index concat_vcf/mPanTro3/final3~mPanTro3.vcf.gz
bcftools concat -a truvari/mPanTro3/panpan-pt.concat.vcf.gz concat_vcf/mPanTro3/final3~mPanTro3.vcf.gz | bgzip > concat_vcf/mPanTro3/panpan-pt.all_svs.vcf.gz
bcftools index concat_vcf/mPanTro3/panpan-pt.all_svs.vcf.gz

#apptainer exec /global/scratch/users/nicolas931010/software/apptainer/vatools_latest.sif vcf-genotype-annotator -o concat_vcf/mPanPan1/final3~mPanPan1.tmp.vcf /global/scratch/users/scott_ferguson/panpan/finished_vcf/final3~mPanPan1.vcf PR00251 .
echo "mPanPan1 PR00251" > concat_vcf/mPanPan1/panpan-pp.sample_to_rename.txt
bcftools query -l truvari/mPanPan1/panpan-pp.concat.vcf.gz  > concat_vcf/mPanPan1/panpan-pp.samples.txt
bcftools reheader -s concat_vcf/mPanPan1/panpan-pp.sample_to_rename.txt /global/scratch/users/scott_ferguson/panpan/finished_vcf/final4~mPanPan1.vcf | bcftools view -S concat_vcf/mPanPan1/panpan-pp.samples.txt | bcftools sort | bgzip > concat_vcf/mPanPan1/final3~mPanPan1.vcf.gz
bcftools index concat_vcf/mPanPan1/final3~mPanPan1.vcf.gz
bcftools concat -a truvari/mPanPan1/panpan-pp.concat.vcf.gz concat_vcf/mPanPan1/final3~mPanPan1.vcf.gz | bgzip > concat_vcf/mPanPan1/panpan-pp.all_svs.vcf.gz
bcftools index concat_vcf/mPanPan1/panpan-pp.all_svs.vcf.gz

bcftools sort /global/scratch/users/scott_ferguson/panpan/finished_vcf/final3~ht2t.vcf | bgzip > concat_vcf/ht2t/final3~ht2t.vcf.gz
bcftools index concat_vcf/ht2t/final3~ht2t.vcf.gz
bcftools concat -a truvari/ht2t/hprc.concat.vcf.gz concat_vcf/ht2t/final3~ht2t.vcf.gz | bgzip > concat_vcf/ht2t/hprc.all_svs.vcf.gz
bcftools index concat_vcf/ht2t/hprc.all_svs.vcf.gz

## count Scott's calls
bcftools query -f '%INFO/SVTYPE\n' mPanTro3/final3~mPanTro3.vcf.gz | sort | uniq -c
bcftools query -f '%INFO/SVTYPE\n' mPanPan1/final3~mPanPan1.vcf.gz | sort | uniq -c
bcftools query -f '%INFO/SVTYPE\n' ht2t/final3~ht2t.vcf.gz | sort | uniq -c
```


#### Generate concatenated bed files

```{bash eval=FALSE}
bcftools query -f '%CHROM\t%ALT\t%POS\t%ID\t%INFO/END\t%INFO/SVLEN\t%INFO/SVTYPE\n' concat_vcf/mPanTro3/panpan-pt.all_svs.vcf.gz > concat_vcf/mPanTro3/panpan-pt.all_svs.tsv
bcftools query -f '%CHROM\t%ALT\t%POS\t%ID\t%INFO/END\t%INFO/SVLEN\t%INFO/SVTYPE\n' concat_vcf/mPanPan1/panpan-pp.all_svs.vcf.gz > concat_vcf/mPanPan1/panpan-pp.all_svs.tsv
bcftools query -f '%CHROM\t%ALT\t%POS\t%ID\t%INFO/END\t%INFO/SVLEN\t%INFO/SVTYPE\n' concat_vcf/ht2t/hprc.all_svs.vcf.gz > concat_vcf/ht2t/hprc.all_svs.tsv
```

```{r eval=FALSE}
chimp_bed_raw <- read_tsv("../concat_vcf/mPanTro3/panpan-pt.all_svs.tsv", col_names=c("chrom","alt", "pos", "id", "end", "svlen", "svtype"), guess_max = 10000) %>%
  mutate(end=ifelse(end==".", NA, end), 
         end=parse_double(end),
         svlen=ifelse(svlen==".", str_count(alt) %>% as.character(), svlen), 
         svlen=parse_double(svlen) %>% abs(),
         end_from_svlen=ifelse(svtype=="INS", pos, pos+svlen)) %>%
  transmute(chrom, start=pos-1, end=ifelse(!is.na(end), end, end_from_svlen), id)
chimp_bed_raw %>%
  write_tsv("../concat_vcf/mPanTro3/panpan-pt.all_svs.bed", col_names = FALSE)

bonobo_bed_raw <- read_tsv("../concat_vcf/mPanPan1/panpan-pp.all_svs.tsv", col_names=c("chrom","alt", "pos", "id", "end", "svlen", "svtype"), guess_max = 10000) %>%
  mutate(end=ifelse(end==".", NA, end), 
         end=parse_double(end),
         svlen=ifelse(svlen==".", str_count(alt) %>% as.character(), svlen), 
         svlen=parse_double(svlen) %>% abs(),
         end_from_svlen=ifelse(svtype=="INS", pos, pos+svlen)) %>%
  transmute(chrom, start=pos-1, end=ifelse(!is.na(end), end, end_from_svlen), id)
bonobo_bed_raw %>%
  write_tsv("../concat_vcf/mPanPan1/panpan-pp.all_svs.bed", col_names = FALSE)

human_bed_raw <- read_tsv("../concat_vcf/ht2t/hprc.all_svs.tsv", col_names=c("chrom","alt", "pos", "id", "end", "svlen", "svtype"), guess_max = 10000) %>%
  mutate(end=ifelse(end==".", NA, end), 
         end=parse_double(end),
         svlen=ifelse(svlen==".", str_count(alt) %>% as.character(), svlen), 
         svlen=parse_double(svlen) %>% abs(),
         end_from_svlen=ifelse(svtype=="INS", pos, pos+svlen)) %>%
  transmute(chrom, start=pos-1, end=ifelse(!is.na(end), end, end_from_svlen), id)
human_bed_raw %>%
  write_tsv("../concat_vcf/ht2t/hprc.all_svs.bed", col_names = FALSE)

## some sanity checks
bonobo_bed_raw %>%
  filter(end-start<1)
chimp_bed_raw %>%
  #mutate(svlen_from_end=ifelse(svtype=="INS", str_count(alt), end-pos)) %>%
  #filter(svlen_from_end/svlen>1.1 | svlen/svlen_from_end>1.1)
  filter(end-end_from_svlen>1 | end_from_svlen-end>1)
ggplot(aes(x=end, y=end_from_svlen)) +
  #ggplot(aes(x=svlen, y=svlen_from_end)) +
  geom_point()  +
  scale_x_log10() +
  scale_y_log10() 
chimp_bed_raw %>%
  count(svlen) %>%
  slice_max(n, n=100)
chimp_bed_raw %>%
  count(svtype)
```

## Final callset < 100kb

```{r}
get_annotated_vcf <- function(reference, dataset){
  if (dataset !="panpan-pt"){
    vcf_raw <- read.vcfR(str_c("../truvari/", reference, "/", dataset, ".concat.vcf.gz"))
  } else {
    vcf_raw <- read.vcfR(str_c("../truvari/", reference, "/lifted_", dataset, ".concat.vcf.gz"))
  }
  sample_size <- (ncol(vcf_raw@gt)-1)
  vcf <-vcfR2tidy(vcf_raw, single_frame = TRUE, format_fields = c("GT", "ID"))
  vcf_dat <- vcf$dat %>%
    clean_names() %>%
    mutate(svtype = factor(svtype, levels = c("INS", "DEL", "DUP", "INV")))
  vcf_long <<- vcf_dat %>%
    dplyr::select(-gt_gt_alleles) %>%
    dplyr::select(id, chrom, pos, ref, alt, svlen, svtype, end, indiv, gt_gt) %>%
    group_by(id, chrom, pos, ref, alt, svlen, svtype, end) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(allele_count=case_when(is.na(gt_gt) | gt_gt=="0/0" ~ 0L,
                                  gt_gt=="0/1" | gt_gt=="1/0" ~ 1L,
                                  gt_gt=="1/1" ~ 2L,)) %>%
    ## INV called by svimasm doesn't have an svlen field, so I'll need to calculate it
    mutate(svlen=ifelse(is.na(svlen), str_count(alt), svlen))
  vcf_summary <- vcf_long %>%
    group_by(id, chrom, pos, ref, alt, svlen, svtype, end) %>%
    summarize(total_allele_count=sum(allele_count), allele_count_vector=str_c(allele_count, collapse = "")) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(allele_frequency=total_allele_count/sample_size/2,
           maf=ifelse(allele_frequency<0.5, allele_frequency, 1-allele_frequency),
           seqlen=case_when(svtype=="DEL"~str_count(ref), 
                            svtype %in% c("INS", "INV") ~ str_count(alt),
                            svtype=="DUP" ~ svlen))
  annotated_indel <- read_tsv(str_c("../truvari/", reference, "/", dataset, ".sniffles_svim-asm.truvari.sorted.merged.annotated_indel.tsv")) %>%
    transmute(merged_id=id, type, length_top_type, divergence, length_annotated, type_simplified) 
  id_table <- read_tsv(str_c("../truvari/", reference, "/", dataset, ".sniffles_svim-asm.truvari.sorted.merged.final_id_table.tsv")) %>%
    transmute(merged_id=id, id=gt_id)
  vcf_annotated <- vcf_summary %>%
    left_join(id_table, by="id") %>%
    left_join(annotated_indel, by="merged_id") %>%
    mutate(type_simplified=fct_relevel(type_simplified, c("SINE/Alu", "LINE/L1", "Retroposon/SVA", "Other Type I TE", "Type II TE", "Simple/tandem repeat", "RNA array", "Unknown", "Non-repeat")))
  return(vcf_annotated)
}
vcf_annotated_chimp <- get_annotated_vcf("mPanTro3", "panpan-pt")
vcf_long_chimp_tmp <- vcf_long
vcf_annotated_bonobo <- get_annotated_vcf("mPanPan1", "panpan-pp")
vcf_long_bonobo_tmp <- vcf_long
vcf_annotated_human <- get_annotated_vcf("ht2t", "hprc")
vcf_long_human_tmp <- vcf_long
vcf_annotated_combined <- bind_rows(vcf_annotated_chimp %>% mutate(species="chimpanzee"),
                                    vcf_annotated_bonobo %>% mutate(species="bonobo"),
                                    vcf_annotated_human %>% mutate(species="human")) %>%
  mutate(type_simplified = type_simplified %>% as.character(),
         type_simplified = ifelse(type_simplified %in% c("Other Type I TE", "Type II TE", "RNA array", "Unknown"), "Other repeats", type_simplified),
         type_simplified=fct_relevel(type_simplified, c("SINE/Alu", "LINE/L1", "Retroposon/SVA", "Simple/tandem repeat", "Other repeats", "Non-repeat")))
```

```{r eval=FALSE}
write_tsv(vcf_annotated_combined, "../truvari/vcf_annotated_combined.tsv")
genotype_long_combined <- vcf_long_chimp_tmp %>%
  mutate(species="chimpanzee") %>%
  bind_rows(vcf_long_bonobo_tmp %>% mutate(species="bonobo")) %>%
  bind_rows(vcf_long_human_tmp %>% mutate(species="human")) %>%
  transmute(species, id, indiv, gt=gt_gt) %>%
  filter(gt != "0/0", !is.na(gt)) 
genotype_long_combined %>%
  write_tsv("../truvari/genotype_long_combined.tsv")
```

## Annotated length profiles for insertions and deletions

```{r}
vcf_annotated_combined <- read_tsv("../truvari/vcf_annotated_combined.tsv") %>%
  mutate(type_simplified=fct_relevel(type_simplified, c("SINE/Alu", "LINE/L1", "Retroposon/SVA", "Simple/tandem repeat", "Other repeats", "Non-repeat")))
scientific_10 <- function(x) {
  ifelse(str_detect(scales::scientific_format()(x), "1e"),
         parse(text=gsub("1e\\+", "10^", scales::scientific_format()(x))),
         #parse(text=gsub("e\\+", " %*% 10^", scales::scientific_format()(x))),
         NA
  )
}

plot_annotated_length_profile <- function(vcf_annotated, svtype_for_plotting, title) {
  vcf_annotated %>%
    filter(svtype %in% svtype_for_plotting) %>%
    mutate(svtype=ifelse(svtype=="INS", "insertion", "deletion"), svtype=fct_relevel(svtype, c("insertion", "deletion"))) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x=abs(seqlen))) +
    geom_histogram(aes(fill=type_simplified), color="black", bins=100) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = pals::cols25(n=25)[c(1:3, 7, 8, 13)], breaks=c("SINE/Alu", "LINE/L1", "Retroposon/SVA", "Simple/tandem repeat", "Other repeats", "Non-repeat"), drop=FALSE) +
    #scale_fill_manual(values = pals::cols25(n=25)[c(1:3, 7, 5 , 8, 4, 11, 13)], breaks=c("SINE/Alu", "LINE/L1", "Retroposon/SVA", "Other Type I TE", "Type II TE", "Simple/tandem repeat", "RNA array", "Unknown", "Non-repeat"), drop=FALSE) +
    labs(x="length") +
    theme_bw() +
    #scale_x_log10(breaks=c(50, 100, 300, 1000, 3000, 10000, 30000, 100000), limits=c(10000, 100000)) +
    scale_x_log10(breaks=c((5:10)*10^1, (1:10)*10^2, (1:10)*10^3, (1:10)*10^4), limits=c(50, 100000), labels=scientific_10) +
    ylab("count") + 
    theme(text = element_text(size=15),
          title = element_text(size=15),
          panel.grid = element_blank()) +
    ggtitle(title)
}
plot_annotated_length_profile(vcf_annotated_combined %>% filter(species=="chimpanzee"), "INS", "Insertions in chimpanzee")
```

```{r fig.width=14, fig.height=5.5}
custom_y_scale <- list(
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-900, 1800), labels=abs),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-2700, 5400), labels=abs),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-4200, 8400), breaks=c(-4000, 0, 4000, 8000), labels=abs)
)
te_labels <- tibble(species=rep(c("bonobo", "chimpanzee", "human"), each=3),
                    te_family=rep(c("Alu", "SVA", "L1"),3),
                    x=c(150, 2000, 11000, 150, 2000, 11000, 150, 2000, 11000),
                    y=c(1200, 600, 500, 4500, 1800, 1400, 6500, 1400, 1200))
p <- vcf_annotated_combined %>%
  filter(svtype %in% c("INS")) %>%
  ggplot(aes()) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y = ..count.., x=abs(seqlen), fill=type_simplified), bins=50) +
  geom_histogram(data=filter(vcf_annotated_combined, svtype=="DEL"), aes(y = -..count.., x=abs(seqlen), fill=type_simplified), bins=50) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0) +
  geom_label(data=te_labels, aes(x=x, y=y, label = te_family, color=te_family), size=6) +
  annotate(geom = "text", x=4000, y=0, label="insertions", hjust = -0.3, vjust = -10, color="black", size=7) +
  annotate(geom = "text", x=4000, y=0, label="deletions", hjust = -0.42, vjust = 5.5, color="black", size=7) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = pals::cols25(n=25)[c(1:3, 7, 8, 13)], breaks=c("SINE/Alu", "LINE/L1", "Retroposon/SVA", "Simple/tandem repeat", "Other repeats", "Non-repeat"), drop=FALSE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = pals::cols25(n=25)[1:3]) +
  labs(x="structural variant length (in bp)") +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_x_log10(breaks=c((5:10)*10^1, (1:10)*10^2, (1:10)*10^3, (1:10)*10^4), limits=c(50, 100000), labels=scientific_10) +
  ylab("count") + 
  ggh4x::facet_grid2(.~species, scales="free_y",independent = "y") +
  ggh4x::facetted_pos_scales(y = custom_y_scale) +
  guides(fill=guide_legend(nrow =1), color=FALSE) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        text = element_text(size = 20),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 16),
        strip.text = element_text(size=20, color="white", face="bold"),
        panel.grid = element_blank())
p
fill_colors <- c("#FF8C69", "#8A865D", "#5C608A")

# Find strips glob
gt<-ggplot_gtable(ggplot_build(p))
strips <- which(startsWith(gt$layout$name,'strip'))
# Change the fill color of each strip
for (s in seq_along(strips)) {
  gt$grobs[[strips[s]]]$grobs[[1]]$children[[1]]$gp$fill <- fill_colors[s]
}
plot(gt)

```

```{r eval=FALSE}
ggsave("../figures/annotated_length_profile_mirror.pdf", gt, width = 14, height = 5.5, units = "in")
```

```{r fig.width=8, fig.height=4}
custom_y_scale <- list(
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-2500, 5000)),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-3500, 7000))
)
p <- vcf_annotated_combined %>%
  filter(svtype %in% c("INS"), species != "bonobo") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=abs(seqlen), fill=type_simplified)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y = ..count..), bins=50) +
  geom_histogram(data=filter(vcf_annotated_combined, svtype=="DEL", species != "bonobo"), aes(y = -..count..), bins=50) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = pals::cols25(n=25)[c(1:3, 7, 8, 13)], breaks=c("SINE/Alu", "LINE/L1", "Retroposon/SVA", "Simple/tandem repeat", "Other repeats", "Non-repeat"), drop=FALSE) +
  labs(x="length") +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_x_log10(breaks=c((5:10)*10^1, (1:10)*10^2, (1:10)*10^3, (1:10)*10^4), limits=c(50, 100000), labels=scientific_10) +
  ylab("count") + 
  ggh4x::facet_grid2(.~species, scales="free_y",independent = "y") +
  ggh4x::facetted_pos_scales(y = custom_y_scale) +
  guides(fill=guide_legend(nrow =1)) +
  theme(legend.position = "top",
        title = element_blank(),
        text = element_text(size = 20),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
        panel.grid = element_blank())
p
#ggsave("../figures/annotated_length_profile_for_grant.pdf", width=8, height = 4)
```

```{r fig.width=16, fig.height=8}
vcf_annotated_combined %>%
  plot_annotated_length_profile(c("INS", "DEL"), "length profile")+
  ggh4x::facet_grid2(svtype~species , scales = "free_y", independent = "y") +
  guides(fill=guide_legend(nrow =1)) +
  theme(legend.position = "top",
        title = element_blank(),
        text = element_text(size = 20),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 16))
```

## Summary stats

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}
full_length_te <- vcf_annotated_combined %>%
  filter(type_simplified %in% c("SINE/Alu", "LINE/L1", "Retroposon/SVA")) %>%
  filter(allele_frequency>0, allele_frequency<1) %>%
  mutate(svlen=abs(svlen)) %>%
  mutate(full_length=(svlen>250 & type_simplified=="SINE/Alu") | (svlen>5000 & type_simplified=="LINE/L1") | (svlen>1800 & type_simplified=="Retroposon/SVA")) 
p <- full_length_te %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=svlen, fill=full_length)) +
  geom_histogram(color="black", bins = 80)+
  scale_x_log10()+
  ggh4x::facet_grid2(species~type_simplified, scales = "free_y", independent = "y") +
  theme_bw()
p
#ggsave("../figures/full_insertion_histogram.pdf", p, width = 12, height = 4, units = "in")
```

```{r, fig.width=2.2, fig.height=4.2}
diversity_summary_stats <- full_length_te %>%
  filter(full_length) %>%
  mutate(sample_size=2*str_count(allele_count_vector)) %>%
  group_by(species, type_simplified, sample_size) %>%
  summarize(theta_p_numerator=sum(sample_size/(sample_size-1)*(1-maf^2-(1-maf)^2)),
            n_segregating_sites=dplyr::n()) %>%
  mutate(theta_w_numerator=n_segregating_sites*psych::harmonic.mean(1:(sample_size-1))/(sample_size-1)) %>%
  left_join(genome_size_table) %>%
  mutate(theta_w=theta_w_numerator/genome_size, theta_p=theta_p_numerator/genome_size) %>%
  dplyr::select(species, type_simplified, theta_w, theta_p) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(type_simplified=fct_relevel(type_simplified, c("SINE/Alu", "Retroposon/SVA", "LINE/L1")))
p <- diversity_summary_stats %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(theta_w, theta_p)) %>%
  mutate(name=ifelse(name=="theta_w", "hat(theta)[w]", "pi")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=species, y=value, fill=species)) +
  geom_col(width=0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#FF8C69", "#8A865D", "#5C608A")) +
  facet_grid(type_simplified~name, labeller = label_parsed, scale="free_y") +
  # scale_y_sqrt() +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "top",
        legend.location = "plot",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        legend.direction = "horizontal",
        legend.key.size = unit(0.05, "inch"),
        legend.text = element_text(margin = margin(r=-3, l = 3, unit = "pt"), size = 11),
        axis.title = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x=element_blank(),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        strip.text.x = element_text(size=12),
        strip.text.y = element_text(color="white"),
        strip.background.x = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA, size = 0),
        legend.box.margin = margin(b = -10, unit = "pt"),
  )
p
# Find the colors used
fill_colors <- pals::cols25(n=25)[c(1,3,2)]
# Find strips glob
gt<-ggplot_gtable(ggplot_build(p))
strips <- which(startsWith(gt$layout$name,'strip-r'))
# Change the fill color of each strip
for (s in seq_along(strips)) {
  gt$grobs[[strips[s]]]$grobs[[1]]$children[[1]]$gp$fill <- fill_colors[s]
}
plot(gt)
#ggsave("../figures/full_insertion_theta.pdf", gt, width = 2.2, height = 4.2, units = "in")
```

## Summary stats for SNVs, and TE to SNV ratio

```{bash eval=FALSE}
## get the SFS from SNVs
cd /global/scratch/users/joana_rocha/PANPAN/PANPAN_snvs/vcfs/
bcftools +fill-tags mPanPan1/diploid/panpa_mapped2mPanPan1.sorted.filtered.vcf.gz --threads 6 -- -t AC | bcftools query -f '%AC\n' | sort --parallel 6 | uniq -c > /global/scratch/users/nicolas931010/sv_detection/docs/panpa_mapped2mPanPan1.sorted.filtered.sfs
bcftools +fill-tags mPanTro3/diploid/pantros_mapped2mPanTro3.sorted.filtered.vcf.gz --threads 6 -- -t AC | bcftools query -f '%AC\n' | sort --parallel 6 | uniq -c > /global/scratch/users/nicolas931010/sv_detection/docs/pantros_mapped2mPanTro3.sorted.filtered.sfs
bcftools +fill-tags ht2t/diploid/hprc_mapped2ht2t.sorted.filtered.vcf.gz --threads 6 -- -t AC | bcftools query -f '%AC\n' | sort --parallel 6 | uniq -c > /global/scratch/users/nicolas931010/sv_detection/docs/hprc_mapped2ht2t.sorted.filtered.sfs
```

```{r, fig.width=7, fig.height=3}
sfs_combined <- bind_rows(
  read.table("../docs/panpa_mapped2mPanPan1.sorted.filtered.sfs", header = FALSE, col.names = c("n_sites", "ac")) %>% mutate(species="bonobo"),
  read.table("../docs/pantros_mapped2mPanTro3.sorted.filtered.sfs", header = FALSE, col.names = c("n_sites", "ac")) %>% mutate(species="chimpanzee"),
  read.table("../docs/hprc_mapped2ht2t.sorted.filtered.sfs", header = FALSE, col.names = c("n_sites", "ac")) %>% mutate(species="human"),
)
sample_size_table <- full_length_te %>% mutate(sample_size=str_count(allele_count_vector)*2) %>% distinct(species, sample_size)
snv_summary_stats <- NULL
# total genome size INCLUDING invariant sites
for (i in 1:nrow(genome_size_table)){
  species_i <- genome_size_table$species[i]
  l <- genome_size_table$genome_size[i] 
  n <- sample_size_table %>% filter(species==species_i) %>% pull(sample_size)
  sfs <- sfs_combined %>% filter(species==species_i) %>% filter(ac<n)
  n_snv <- sum(sfs$n_sites)
  ## WATTERSON'S THETA
  a1 <- sum(1 / (1:(n - 1)))
  theta_w <- n_snv / (a1 * l)
  # pi
  pi_total <- sum(sfs$n_sites * (2 * sfs$ac * (n - sfs$ac) / (n * (n - 1))))
  pi <- pi_total / l
  snv_summary_stats <- bind_rows(snv_summary_stats, tibble(species=species_i, theta_w_snv=theta_w, pi_snv=pi))
}
scientific_notation <- function(x) {
  ifelse(str_detect(scales::scientific_format()(x), "0e"),
         "0",
         parse(text=gsub("e", " %*% 10^", scales::scientific_format()(x)))
  )
}

p <- diversity_summary_stats %>%
  left_join(snv_summary_stats) %>%
  transmute(species,type_simplified, theta_p, theta_p_ratio=theta_p/pi_snv) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(theta_p, theta_p_ratio)) %>%
  mutate(name=ifelse(name=="theta_p_ratio", "pi[TE]/pi[SNV]", "pi[TE]")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=species, y=value, fill=species)) +
  geom_col(width=0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#FF8C69", "#8A865D", "#5C608A")) +
  coord_flip()+
  # facet_grid(name~type_simplified, labeller = label_parsed, scale="free") +
  facet_grid2(name~type_simplified,
              scales = "free",
              independent = "all",
              labeller = label_parsed) +
  facetted_pos_scales(y = list(scale_y_continuous(labels = scientific_notation),
                               scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0, 5e-8, 10e-8), labels = scientific_notation),
                               scale_y_continuous(labels = scientific_notation),
                               scale_y_continuous(labels = scientific_notation),
                               scale_y_continuous(labels = scientific_notation),
                               scale_y_continuous(labels = scientific_notation))) +
  # scale_y_sqrt() +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.location = "plot",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        legend.direction = "horizontal",
        legend.key.size = unit(0.05, "inch"),
        legend.text = element_text(margin = margin(r=-3, l = 3, unit = "pt"), size = 11),
        axis.title = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x=element_text(size=11, angle=0, vjust=0),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        strip.text.y = element_text(size=14),
        strip.text.x = element_text(size=16, color="white", face="bold"),
        strip.background.y = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA, size = 0),
        legend.box.margin = margin(b = -10, unit = "pt"),
  )
p
# Find the colors used
fill_colors <- pals::cols25(n=25)[c(1,3,2)]
# Find strips glob
gt<-ggplot_gtable(ggplot_build(p))
strips <- which(startsWith(gt$layout$name,'strip-t'))
# Change the fill color of each strip
for (s in seq_along(strips)) {
  gt$grobs[[strips[s]]]$grobs[[1]]$children[[1]]$gp$fill <- fill_colors[s]
  gt$grobs[[strips[s]]]$grobs[[1]]$children[[2]]$children[[1]]$label <- c("SINE/Alu", "Retroposon/SVA", "LINE/L1")[s]
}
plot(gt)
# ggsave("../figures/full_insertion_pi.pdf", gt, width = 7, height = 3, units = "in")
```

## Divergence profile

```{r fig.width=16, fig.height=8}
vcf_annotated_combined %>%
  filter(svtype %in% c("INS", "DEL"), 
         type_simplified %in% c("SINE/Alu", "LINE/L1", "Retroposon/SVA", "Other Type I TE")) %>%
  mutate(svtype=ifelse(svtype=="INS", "insertion", "deletion"), svtype=fct_relevel(svtype, c("insertion", "deletion"))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=abs(divergence))) +
  geom_histogram(aes(fill=type_simplified), color="black", bins=80) +
  #geom_density(aes(fill=type_simplified), color="black", alpha=0.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = pals::cols25(n=25)[c(1:3, 7)], breaks=c("SINE/Alu", "LINE/L1", "Retroposon/SVA", "Other Type I TE")) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits=c(0,40)) +
  labs(x="percent divergence", y="count") + 
  ggh4x::facet_grid2(type_simplified~species , scales = "free_y", independent = "y") +
  guides(fill=guide_legend(nrow =1)) +
  cowplot::theme_cowplot() +
  theme(legend.position = "top",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        text = element_text(size = 20),
        strip.text.x = element_text(size = 25),
        strip.text.y = element_text(size = 14),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 16))
```


## SFS

```{r fig.width=12, fig.height=6}
vcf_annotated_combined %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=total_allele_count)) +
  geom_bar(color="black", fill="white") +
  ggh4x::facet_grid2(svtype~species, scales="free", independent = "y") +
  theme_cowplot() +
  labs(x="number of non-reference alleles")
```

## Ideogram

#### all species to ht2t

###### liftover to ht2t

```{r eval=FALSE}
## create genomic windows on h2t
conda activate bedtools
awk 'BEGIN {OFS="\t"} {print $1, 0, $2, $1}' reference/ht2t.fasta.fai > liftover/ht2t.bed
bedtools makewindows -b liftover/ht2t.bed -w 100000 -i srcwinnum > liftover/ht2t.100kb-windows.bed
bedtools makewindows -b liftover/ht2t.bed -w 500000 -i srcwinnum > liftover/ht2t.500kb-windows.bed
bedtools makewindows -b liftover/ht2t.bed -w 2000000 -i srcwinnum > liftover/ht2t.2mb-windows.bed

#mamba create -c conda-forge -c bioconda -n ucsc-liftover ucsc-liftover
#mamba create -c conda-forge -c bioconda -n picard picard
#mamba create -c conda-forge -c bioconda -n rustybam rustybam

## alignment
conda activate minimap2
cd /global/scratch/users/nicolas931010/sv_detection
mkdir -p minimap2/ref_to_ref
#minimap2 -cx asm10  -t 32 --cs reference/mPanTro3.fasta reference/ht2t.fasta > minimap2/ref_to_ref/ht2t_to_mPanTro3.paf 2> minimap2/ref_to_ref/ht2t_to_mPanTro3.paf.log
#minimap2 -cx asm10  -t 32 --cs reference/mPanPan1.fasta reference/ht2t.fasta > minimap2/ref_to_ref/ht2t_to_mPanPan1.paf 2> minimap2/ref_to_ref/ht2t_to_mPanPan1.paf.log
minimap2 -cx asm10  -t 32 --cs reference/ht2t.fasta reference/mPanTro3.fasta > minimap2/ref_to_ref/mPanTro3_to_ht2t.paf 2> minimap2/ref_to_ref/mPanTro3_to_ht2t.paf.log
minimap2 -cx asm10  -t 32 --cs reference/ht2t.fasta reference/mPanPan1.fasta > minimap2/ref_to_ref/mPanPan1_to_ht2t.paf 2> minimap2/ref_to_ref/mPanPan1_to_ht2t.paf.log

conda deactivate
#conda activate rustybam
#rb trim-paf minimap2/ref_to_ref/ht2t_to_mPanTro3.paf | rb filter --paired-len 10000 > minimap2/ref_to_ref/ht2t_to_mPanTro3.filtered.paf
#sort -k6,6 -k8,8n minimap2/ref_to_ref/ht2t_to_mPanTro3.paf > minimap2/ref_to_ref/ht2t_to_mPanTro3.filtered.paf
#sort -k6,6 -k8,8n minimap2/ref_to_ref/ht2t_to_mPanTro3.paf | rb trim-paf > minimap2/ref_to_ref/ht2t_to_mPanTro3.filtered.paf

## paf to chain
mamba create -c conda-forge -c bioconda -n paf2chain paf2chain
conda activate paf2chain
#paf2chain --input minimap2/ref_to_ref/ht2t_to_mPanTro3.paf > minimap2/ref_to_ref/ht2t_to_mPanTro3.chain 2> minimap2/ref_to_ref/ht2t_to_mPanTro3.chain.log
paf2chain --input minimap2/ref_to_ref/mPanTro3_to_ht2t.paf > minimap2/ref_to_ref/mPanTro3_to_ht2t.chain 2> minimap2/ref_to_ref/mPanTro3_to_ht2t.chain.log
paf2chain --input minimap2/ref_to_ref/mPanPan1_to_ht2t.paf > minimap2/ref_to_ref/mPanPan1_to_ht2t.chain 2> minimap2/ref_to_ref/mPanPan1_to_ht2t.chain.log
conda deactivate

## liftover
mkdir -p liftover/ht2t
mamba create -c conda-forge -c bioconda -n ucsc-liftover ucsc-liftover
conda activate ucsc-liftover
liftOver -multiple -minMatch=0.1 liftover/ht2t.2mb-windows.bed minimap2/ref_to_ref/mPanTro3_to_ht2t.chain liftover/ht2t.2mb-windows.mPanTro3.lifted.bed liftover/ht2t.2mb-windows.mPanTro3.unlifted.bed &> liftover/ht2t.2mb-windows.mPanTro3.log
liftOver -multiple -minMatch=0.1 liftover/ht2t.2mb-windows.bed minimap2/ref_to_ref/mPanPan1_to_ht2t.chain liftover/ht2t.2mb-windows.mPanPan1.lifted.bed liftover/ht2t.2mb-windows.mPanPan1.unlifted.bed &> liftover/ht2t.2mb-windows.mPanPan1.log
conda deactivate

## bedtools intersect
conda activate bedtools
bedtools intersect -a liftover/ht2t.2mb-windows.bed -b concat_vcf/ht2t/hprc.all_svs.bed -loj > liftover/hprc.all_svs.in.ht2t.2mb-windows.bed 2> liftover/hprc.all_svs.in.ht2t.2mb-windows.log
bedtools intersect -a liftover/ht2t.2mb-windows.mPanTro3.lifted.bed -b concat_vcf/mPanTro3/panpan-pt.all_svs.bed -loj > liftover/panpan-pt.all_svs.in.mPanTro3.2mb-windows.bed 2> liftover/panpan-pt.all_svs.in.mPanTro3.2mb-windows.log
bedtools intersect -a liftover/ht2t.2mb-windows.mPanPan1.lifted.bed -b concat_vcf/mPanPan1/panpan-pp.all_svs.bed -loj > liftover/panpan-pp.all_svs.in.mPanPan1.2mb-windows.bed 2> liftover/panpan-pp.all_svs.in.mPanPan1.2mb-windows.log

## lift over a file for Peter
liftOver -multiple -minMatch=0.1 ../misc/pathogenic_cnvs_hs1.all.renamed.txt minimap2/ref_to_ref/mPanTro3_to_ht2t.chain ../misc/pathogenic_cnvs_hs1.all.renamed.lifted_to_mPanTro3.bed ../misc/pathogenic_cnvs_hs1.all.renamed.unlifted.bed &> ../misc/pathogenic_cnvs_hs1.all.renamed.lifted_to_mPanTro3.log

```

###### plotting

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=8}
ht2t_windows <- read_tsv("../liftover/ht2t.2mb-windows.bed", col_names = c("chrom", "start", "end", "window_id"))
hprc_svs_in_windows <- read_tsv("../liftover/hprc.all_svs.in.ht2t.2mb-windows.bed", col_names = c("chrom", "start", "end", "window_id", "sv_chrom", "sv_start", "sv_end", "sv_id")) %>%
  mutate(species="human")
pt_svs_in_windows <- read_tsv("../liftover/panpan-pt.all_svs.in.mPanTro3.2mb-windows.bed", col_names = c("chrom", "start", "end", "window_id", "subwindow_id", "sv_chrom", "sv_start", "sv_end", "sv_id")) %>%
  mutate(species="chimpanzee")
pp_svs_in_windows <- read_tsv("../liftover/panpan-pp.all_svs.in.mPanPan1.2mb-windows.bed", col_names = c("chrom", "start", "end", "window_id", "subwindow_id", "sv_chrom", "sv_start", "sv_end", "sv_id")) %>%
  mutate(species="bonobo")
svs_in_windows <- hprc_svs_in_windows %>%
  bind_rows(pt_svs_in_windows) %>%
  bind_rows(pp_svs_in_windows) %>%
  filter(sv_id != ".") %>%
  ## Remove larger SVs
  filter(!str_detect(sv_id, "^INS|^DEL|^TRA|^DUP|^HDR|^INV"))
# mutate(junk=str_sub(sv_id, 1, 3)) %>%
# count(junk) %>%
# arrange(-n)
svs_in_windows_summary <- svs_in_windows %>%
  distinct(window_id, sv_id, species) %>%
  group_by(species) %>%
  summarise(n_svs_in_plot = length(sv_id), n_unique_svs_in_plot = length(unique(sv_id))) #%>%
# mutate(n_unique_svs_total=c(filter(vcf_annotated_combined, species=="bonobo") %>% nrow(),
#                             filter(vcf_annotated_combined, species=="chimpanzee") %>% nrow(),
#                             filter(vcf_annotated_combined, species=="human") %>% nrow()))
# mutate(n_unique_svs_total=c(readLines("../concat_vcf/mPanPan1/panpan-pp.all_svs.bed") %>% length(),
#                             readLines("../concat_vcf/mPanTro3/panpan-pt.all_svs.bed") %>% length(),
#                             readLines("../concat_vcf/ht2t/hprc.all_svs.bed") %>% length()))
svs_in_windows_summary
lifted_window_length <- bind_rows(read_tsv("../liftover/ht2t.2mb-windows.mPanPan1.lifted.bed", col_names = c("chr", "start", "end", "window_id", "match_id")) %>% mutate(species="bonobo"),
                                  read_tsv("../liftover/ht2t.2mb-windows.mPanTro3.lifted.bed", col_names = c("chr", "start", "end", "window_id", "match_id"))%>% mutate(species="chimpanzee")) %>%
  summarise(lifted_length=sum(end-start), .by = c("window_id", "species"))
sv_count_in_windows <- svs_in_windows %>%
  distinct(window_id, sv_id, species) %>%
  summarise(n=dplyr::n(), .by=c(species, window_id)) %>%
  left_join(crossing(ht2t_windows, species=c("human", "chimpanzee", "bonobo")), .) %>%
  mutate(n=ifelse(is.na(n), 0, n), p=n/sum(n), .by=species) %>%
  left_join(lifted_window_length) %>%
  mutate(lifted_length=ifelse(species=="human", 2*10^6, lifted_length),
         lifted_length=ifelse(lifted_length< 1*10^6 | lifted_length>4*10^6, NA, lifted_length)
         ) %>%
  # filter(!is.na(lifted_length)) %>%
  mutate(density=n/lifted_length, density_normalized=density/sum(density, na.rm = TRUE), .by=species)
sv_count_in_windows %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=start, y=density_normalized, color=species)) +
  geom_line() +
  scale_y_sqrt() +
  #facet_wrap(~chrom, ncol = 1) +
  facet_grid(chrom~species) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(strip.text = element_blank()) 
## ideogram
reference_length <- read_tsv(str_c("../reference/ht2t.fasta.fai"), col_names = FALSE)  %>%
  transmute(chrom=X1, start=0, end=X2) %>%
  mutate(chrom_number = str_extract(chrom, "^(.+?)\\.") %>% parse_number() %>% magrittr::subtract(60924)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(chrom_number), chrom_number<23) %>%
  arrange(desc(chrom_number)) %>%
  mutate(chrom=str_c("chr", chrom_number), chrom=as_factor(chrom))
reference_chrom_order <- reference_length %>%
  pull(chrom) %>%
  levels()
reference_chrom_label <- reference_length %>%
  pull(chrom) %>%
  as.character()
reference_feature <- read_tsv(str_c("../reference/ht2t_genome_feature.bed"), col_names = FALSE) %>%
  transmute(chrom=X1, start=X2, end=X3, type=X4) %>%
  mutate(type=case_when(type=="CEN"~"Cen",
                        type=="TEL"~"Telo",
                        TRUE~type)) %>%
  filter(type %in% c("Cen", "Telo")) %>%
  filter(chrom %in% reference_chrom_order) %>%
  mutate(chrom=fct_relevel(chrom, reference_chrom_order))
sv_count_for_ideogram  <- sv_count_in_windows %>%
  mutate(chrom_number = str_extract(chrom, "^(.+?)\\.") %>% parse_number() %>% magrittr::subtract(60924)) %>%
  mutate(chrom=str_c("chr", chrom_number)) %>%
  filter(chrom %in% reference_chrom_order) %>%
  #filter(type_simplified=="SINE/Alu", svtype=="INS") %>%
  mutate(chrom=fct_relevel(chrom, reference_chrom_order)) %>%
  mutate(p=n/sum(n), density_normalized=density/sum(density, na.rm = TRUE),.by=species) 
sv_count_for_ideogram %>%
  group_by(species) %>%
  slice_max(order_by=density_normalized, n=1)
offset <-1*10^6
ideogram <- reference_length %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_rect(aes(xmin=start, xmax=end, ymin=as.numeric(chrom)-0.3, ymax=as.numeric(chrom)-0.2), fill="white", color="black", linewidth=0.5) +
  geom_rect(data=reference_feature, aes(xmin=start, xmax=end, ymin=as.numeric(chrom)-0.3, ymax=as.numeric(chrom)-0.2), linewidth=0.5, color="black") +
  #ggridges::geom_density_ridges(data=joined_vcf_for_ideogram,aes(y=as.numeric(chrom), group=chrom, x=pos), position=position_nudge(y=-0.05), rel_min_height = 0.02, scale=0.8, bandwidth=200000, color=NA, fill=density_fill, panel_scaling = TRUE)+
  ggridges::geom_density_ridges(data=sv_count_for_ideogram %>% filter(species=="bonobo"), aes(y=as.numeric(chrom), group=chrom, x=start+4*offset, height=density_normalized, fill=species, color=species), position=position_nudge(y=0.37), rel_min_height = 0.0, scale=0.8, alpha=0.3, panel_scaling = FALSE, stat="identity")+
  ggridges::geom_density_ridges(data=sv_count_for_ideogram %>% filter(species=="chimpanzee"), aes(y=as.numeric(chrom), group=chrom, x=start+2*offset, height=density_normalized, fill=species, color=species), position=position_nudge(y=0.13), rel_min_height = 0.0, scale=0.8, alpha=0.3, panel_scaling = FALSE, stat="identity")+
  ggridges::geom_density_ridges(data=sv_count_for_ideogram %>% filter(species=="human"), aes(y=as.numeric(chrom), group=chrom, x=start+0*offset, height=density_normalized, fill=species, color=species), position=position_nudge(y=-0.11), rel_min_height = 0.0, scale=0.8, alpha=0.3, panel_scaling = FALSE, stat="identity")+
  #ggridges::geom_ridgeline(data=sv_count_for_ideogram %>% filter(species=="human"),aes(y=as.numeric(chrom), group=chrom, x=start, height=density_p), position=position_nudge(y=-0.05), scale=0.8, fill="grey",color=NA)+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks=1:length(reference_chrom_label), labels=reference_chrom_label, expand=c(0.01, 0)) +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), breaks = 0:4*5*10^7, labels = 0:4*5*10) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#FF8C69", "#8A865D", "#5C608A")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#FF8C69", "#8A865D", "#5C608A")) +
  #scale_color_manual(values = c("#00000000", "#00000000", "#00000000")) +
  labs(x="position (in Mbp)") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x = element_line(),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_text(angle=0))
ideogram
```

```{r fig.width=9, fig.height=3}
sv_count_for_ideogram_wide <- sv_count_for_ideogram %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = species, values_from=c(n, p, density, density_normalized, lifted_length)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(density_normalized_chimpanzee), !is.na(density_normalized_bonobo)) %>%
  mutate(density_normalized_chimpanzee=density_chimpanzee/sum(density_chimpanzee),
         density_normalized_bonobo=density_bonobo/sum(density_bonobo),
         density_normalized_human=density_human/sum(density_human))
r2_1 <- cor(sv_count_for_ideogram_wide$density_normalized_human, sv_count_for_ideogram_wide$density_normalized_chimpanzee)^2
p2_1 <- lm(sv_count_for_ideogram_wide$density_normalized_chimpanzee~sv_count_for_ideogram_wide$density_normalized_human) %>% summary() %>% .$coefficients %>% .[2, 4]
p1 <- sv_count_for_ideogram_wide %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=density_normalized_human, y=density_normalized_chimpanzee)) +
  geom_hex(binwidth = c(0.002, 0.002)) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c() +
  # geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  geom_abline(slope=1, intercept = 0) +
  #annotate(geom="text", label=str_c("p==", p2_1), parse=TRUE, x=0.2, y=1.5) +
  annotate(geom="text", label=str_c("R^2==", round(r2_1,2)), parse=TRUE, x=0.009, y=0.0002, size=4) +
  coord_fixed(xlim=c(0, 0.013),ylim=c(0, 0.013))+
  labs(x="human", y="chimpanzee") +
  scale_x_sqrt()+
  scale_y_sqrt()+
  theme_bw() +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = c(0.3, 0.8),
        legend.direction = "horizontal",
        legend.title.position = "top")
r2_2 <- cor(sv_count_for_ideogram_wide$density_normalized_human, sv_count_for_ideogram_wide$density_normalized_bonobo)^2
p2_2 <- lm(sv_count_for_ideogram_wide$density_normalized_bonobo~sv_count_for_ideogram_wide$density_normalized_human) %>% summary() %>% .$coefficients %>% .[2, 4]
p2 <- sv_count_for_ideogram_wide %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=density_normalized_human, y=density_normalized_bonobo)) +
  geom_hex(binwidth = c(0.002, 0.002)) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c() +
  # geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  geom_abline(slope=1, intercept = 0) +
  annotate(geom="text", label=str_c("R^2==", round(r2_2,2)), parse=TRUE, x=0.009, y=0.0002, size=4) +
  coord_fixed(xlim=c(0, 0.013),ylim=c(0, 0.013))+
  scale_x_sqrt()+
  scale_y_sqrt()+
  labs(x="human", y="bonobo") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = c(0.3, 0.8),
        legend.direction = "horizontal",
        legend.title.position = "top",
        panel.grid = element_blank())
r2_3 <- cor(sv_count_for_ideogram_wide$density_normalized_chimpanzee, sv_count_for_ideogram_wide$density_normalized_bonobo)^2
p2_3 <- lm(sv_count_for_ideogram_wide$density_normalized_bonobo~sv_count_for_ideogram_wide$density_normalized_chimpanzee) %>% summary() %>% .$coefficients %>% .[2, 4]
p3 <- sv_count_for_ideogram_wide %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=density_normalized_chimpanzee, y=density_normalized_bonobo)) +
  geom_hex(binwidth = c(0.002, 0.002)) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c() +
  # geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  geom_abline(slope=1, intercept = 0) +
  annotate(geom="text", label=str_c("R^2==", round(r2_3,2)), parse=TRUE, x=0.009, y=0.0002, size=4) +
  coord_fixed(xlim=c(0, 0.013),ylim=c(0, 0.013))+
  scale_x_sqrt()+
  scale_y_sqrt()+
  labs(x="chimpanzee", y="bonobo") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = c(0.3, 0.8),
        legend.direction = "horizontal",
        legend.title.position = "top",
        panel.grid = element_blank())
# sv_hotspot_correlation <- plot_grid(plot_grid(p_legend, NA, rel_widths = c(0.9, 0.05), nrow = 1), p1, p2, p3, ncol=1, rel_heights = c(0.5, 1, 1, 1), scale = c(1, 1, rep(1.05, 3)))
sv_hotspot_correlation <- plot_grid(p1, p2, p3, nrow=1, rel_widths = c(1, 1, 1), scale = c(1, 1, 1))

sv_hotspot_correlation
```

```{r eval=FALSE}
ggsave("../figures/sv_density_ideogram_lifted_to_ht2t.pdf", ideogram, width = 6, height=8)
ggsave("../figures/sv_density_correlation.pdf", sv_hotspot_correlation, width = 9, height=3)

```

Note that I tried picard LiftoverVcf as well but it didn't work very well

```{bash eval=FALSE}
conda activate picard
mkdir -p liftovervcf/ht2t
gunzip -c concat_vcf/mPanTro3/panpan-pt.concat.vcf.gz > concat_vcf/mPanTro3/panpan-pt.concat.vcf
#picard CreateSequenceDictionary R=reference/ht2t.fasta O=reference/ht2t.fasta.dict
picard CreateSequenceDictionary R=reference/ht2t.fasta O=reference/ht2t.dict
#bcftools view concat_vcf/mPanTro3/panpan-pt.concat.vcf | head -n 10000 > concat_vcf/mPanTro3/test.vcf
picard LiftoverVcf -Xmx60g I=concat_vcf/mPanTro3/panpan-pt.concat.vcf O=liftovervcf/ht2t/panpan-pt.concat.vcf CHAIN=minimap2/ref_to_ref/ht2t_to_mPanTro3.chain REJECT=liftovervcf/ht2t/panpan-pt.concat.rejected_variants.vcf R=reference/ht2t.fasta 2> liftovervcf/ht2t/panpan-pt.concat.log
bcftools view liftovervcf/ht2t/panpan-pt.concat.rejected_variants.vcf -H | wc #38636
bcftools view liftovervcf/ht2t/panpan-pt.concat.vcf -H | wc #19872
picard LiftoverVcf I=concat_vcf/mPanTro3/panpan-pt.concat.vcf O=liftovervcf/ht2t/panpan-pt.concat.vcf CHAIN=minimap2/ref_to_ref/ht2t_to_mPanTro3.chain REJECT=liftovervcf/ht2t/panpan-pt.concat.rejected_variants.vcf R=reference/ht2t.fasta 2> liftovervcf/ht2t/panpan-pt.concat.log
```


#### each species to its own reference

```{r eval=FALSE, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
window_size <- 1*10^6
plot_ideogram <- function(reference, vcf, density_fill){
  if(reference=="ht2t"){
    reference_length_tmp <- read_tsv(str_c("../reference/", reference, ".fasta.fai"), col_names = FALSE)  %>%
      transmute(chrom=X1, start=0, end=X2) %>%
      mutate(chrom_number = str_extract(chrom, "^(.+?)\\.") %>% parse_number() %>% magrittr::subtract(60924)) %>%
      filter(!is.na(chrom_number), chrom_number<23) %>%
      arrange(desc(chrom_number)) %>%
      .[c(1:4, 6:7, 5, 8:10, 21, 14, 11:13,15:20, 22),] %>%
      mutate(chrom=str_c("chr", chrom_number))
    reference_length <- reference_length_tmp %>%
      bind_rows(tibble(chrom="", start=NA, end=NA, chrom_number=23), .) %>%
      mutate(chrom=factor(chrom, c(reference_length_tmp$chrom[1:10], "", reference_length_tmp$chrom[11:22]))) %>%
      arrange(chrom)
    vcf <- vcf %>%
      mutate(chrom_number = str_extract(chrom, "^(.+?)\\.") %>% parse_number() %>% magrittr::subtract(60924)) %>%
      mutate(chrom=str_c("chr", chrom_number))
  } else {
    reference_length <- read_tsv(str_c("../reference/", reference, ".fasta.fai"), col_names = FALSE) %>%
      transmute(chrom=X1, start=0, end=X2) %>%
      mutate(chrom_number = str_extract(chrom, "^(.+?)_") %>% parse_number()) %>%
      filter(!is.na(chrom_number), chrom_number<100) %>%
      arrange(desc(chrom_number)) %>%
      mutate(chrom=as_factor(chrom)) 
  }
  reference_chrom_order <- reference_length %>%
    pull(chrom) %>%
    levels()
  reference_chrom_label <- reference_length %>%
    mutate(tmp=ifelse(is.na(end), "", str_c("chr", chrom_number))) %>%
    pull(tmp)
  reference_feature <- read_tsv(str_c("../reference/", reference, "_genome_feature.bed"), col_names = FALSE) %>%
    transmute(chrom=X1, start=X2, end=X3, type=X4) %>%
    mutate(type=case_when(type=="CEN"~"Cen",
                          type=="TEL"~"Telo",
                          TRUE~type)) %>%
    filter(type %in% c("Cen", "Telo")) %>%
    filter(chrom %in% reference_chrom_order) %>%
    mutate(chrom=factor(chrom, reference_chrom_order))
  joined_vcf_for_ideogram  <- vcf %>%
    filter(chrom %in% reference_chrom_order) %>%
    #filter(type_simplified=="SINE/Alu", svtype=="INS") %>%
    mutate(chrom=factor(chrom, reference_chrom_order)) 
  window_density <- joined_vcf_for_ideogram %>%
    left_join(transmute(reference_length, chrom, chrom_end=end)) %>%
    dplyr::transmute(chrom=as.character(chrom), pos, chrom_end) %>%
    mutate(window_pos = cut(pos, breaks = seq(from=0, to=250*10^6, by=window_size), labels = seq(from=0+window_size/2, to=250*10^6-window_size/2, by=window_size)) %>% as.character() %>% as.integer(),
           window_name = str_c(chrom, "_", window_pos)) %>%
    summarise(sv_count=dplyr::n(), .by = c(chrom, chrom_end, window_pos, window_name)) %>%
    mutate(start=window_pos-window_size/2, end=ifelse(window_pos+window_size/2< chrom_end, window_pos+window_size/2, chrom_end)) %>%
    mutate(sv_density=sv_count/(end-start)) %>%
    filter((end-start)>=window_size/10)
  max_density <- max(window_density$sv_density)
  hotspot_position <<- window_density %>%
    mutate(threshold=mean(sv_density)+3*sd(sv_density)) %>%
    filter(sv_density>threshold) %>%
    arrange(chrom, window_pos) %>%
    transmute(seqnames=chrom, start, end) %>%
    as_granges() %>%
    reduce_ranges(min.gapwidth = window_size) %>%
    as_tibble() %>%
    transmute(reference=reference, chrom=seqnames, start, end, mid=(start+end)/2) %>%
    mutate(chrom=factor(chrom, reference_chrom_order)) 
  ideogram <- reference_length %>%
    ggplot() +
    geom_rect(aes(xmin=start, xmax=end, ymin=as.numeric(chrom)-0.4, ymax=as.numeric(chrom)-0.2), fill="white", color="black", size=0.5) +
    geom_rect(data=reference_feature, aes(xmin=start, xmax=end, ymin=as.numeric(chrom)-0.4, ymax=as.numeric(chrom)-0.2), size=0.5, color="black") +
    #ggridges::geom_density_ridges(data=joined_vcf_for_ideogram,aes(y=as.numeric(chrom), group=chrom, x=pos), position=position_nudge(y=-0.05), rel_min_height = 0.02, scale=0.8, bandwidth=200000, color=NA, fill=density_fill, panel_scaling = TRUE)+
    # ggridges::geom_density_ridges(data=joined_vcf_for_ideogram,aes(y=as.numeric(chrom), group=chrom, x=pos, fill=svtype), position=position_nudge(y=-0.05), rel_min_height = 0.02, scale=0.8, bandwidth=200000, color=NA, panel_scaling = TRUE, fill=density_fill, alpha=0.5)+
    ggridges::geom_ridgeline(data=window_density %>% mutate(chrom=factor(chrom, reference_chrom_order)), aes(y=as.numeric(chrom), group=chrom, x=(start+end)/2, height=sv_density), alpha=0.3, rel_min_height = 0.0, scale=1*10^0/max_density, fill=density_fill, color=density_fill)+
    # geom_point(data=hotspot_position, aes(x=mid, y=as.numeric(chrom)-0.12), shape="*", size=5) +
    # geom_segment(data=hotspot_position, aes(x=start,xend=end, y=as.numeric(chrom)+0.45, yend=as.numeric(chrom)+0.45)) +
    geom_rect(data=hotspot_position, aes(xmin=start, xmax=end, ymin=as.numeric(chrom)-0.4, ymax=as.numeric(chrom)-0.2), size=0.5, color="red", fill="red") +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks=1:length(reference_chrom_label), labels=reference_chrom_label, expand=c(0.01, 0)) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = 0:4*5*10^7, labels = 0:4*5*10) +
    labs(x="position (in Mbp)") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
          axis.ticks.x = element_line(),
          axis.title.y = element_blank())
  return(ideogram)
}
p1 <- plot_ideogram("mPanTro3", vcf_annotated_combined %>% filter(species=="chimpanzee"), "#8A865D") +
  ggtitle("Chimpanzee mapped to T2T-mPanTro3")
hotspot_position_final <- hotspot_position %>% mutate(species="chimpanzee")
p2 <- plot_ideogram("mPanPan1", vcf_annotated_combined %>% filter(species=="bonobo"), "#FF8C69") +
  ggtitle("Bonobo mapped to T2T-mPanPan1")
hotspot_position_final <- bind_rows(hotspot_position_final, hotspot_position %>% mutate(species="bonobo"))
p3 <- plot_ideogram("ht2t", vcf_annotated_combined %>% filter(species=="human"), "#5C608A") +
  ggtitle("Human mapped to CHM13")
hotspot_position_final <- bind_rows(hotspot_position_final, hotspot_position %>% mutate(species="human"))
combined_ideogram <- p1 + p2 + p3 + plot_layout()
combined_ideogram
hotspot_position_final %>%
  count(species)
# hotspot_position_final %>%
#   dplyr::select(chrom, start, end, species) %>%
#   write_tsv("../docs/sv_hotspots.tsv")
# ggsave("../figures/combined_sv_density_ideogram.pdf", combined_ideogram, width=10, height = 10)
```

```{r}
library(plyranges)
vcf_annotated_combined %>%
  dplyr::select(chrom, pos, species) %>%
  mutate(window_pos = cut(pos, breaks = seq(from=0, to=250*10^6, by=2*10^6), labels = seq(from=1*10^6, to=249*10^6, by=2*10^6)) %>% as.character() %>% as.integer(),
         window_name = str_c(chrom, "_", window_pos)) %>%
  summarise(sv_count=n(), .by = c(chrom, species, window_pos, window_name)) %>%
  mutate(sv_density=sv_count/(2*10^6)) %>%
  mutate(threshold=mean(sv_count)+3*sd(sv_count), .by=species) %>%
  # slice_max(order_by = sv_density, by=species, n=50) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=sv_density, fill = sv_count>threshold)) +
  geom_histogram()+
  facet_wrap(~species, ncol = 1) +
  scale_y_sqrt()
vcf_annotated_combined %>%
  dplyr::select(chrom, pos, species) %>%
  mutate(window_pos = cut(pos, breaks = seq(from=0, to=250*10^6, by=2*10^6), labels = seq(from=1*10^6, to=249*10^6, by=2*10^6)) %>% as.character() %>% as.integer(),
         window_name = str_c(chrom, "_", window_pos)) %>%
  summarise(sv_count=dplyr::n(), .by = c(chrom, species, window_pos, window_name)) %>%
  mutate(sv_density=sv_count/(2*10^6)) %>%
  mutate(threshold=mean(sv_count)+3*sd(sv_count), .by=species) %>%
  filter(sv_count>threshold) %>%
  arrange(species, chrom, window_pos) %>%
  mutate(start=window_pos-10^6, end=window_pos+10^6) %>%
  transmute(seqnames=chrom, start, end, species) %>%
  filter(species=="bonobo") %>%
  as_granges() %>%
  reduce_ranges(min.gapwidth = 4*10^6) %>%
  as_tibble() %>%
  transmute(species="bonobo", chrom=seqnames, start, end, mid=(start+end)/2)
```

## PCA

```{r fig.height=5, fig.width=6}
## HPRC
hprc_eigenvec <- read_delim(str_c("../truvari/ht2t/hprc.concat.eigenvec"), delim = " ", col_names = c("sample_id", "junk", str_c("PC", 1:20))) %>%
  dplyr::select(-junk) %>%
  left_join(hprc_metadata, by=c("sample_id"="id")) 
hprc_eigenval <- read_lines(str_c("../truvari/ht2t/hprc.concat.eigenval")) %>%
  parse_double() %>%
  magrittr::divide_by(., sum(.)) %>%
  magrittr::multiply_by(100) %>%
  round(2)
hprc_eigenvec_outlier <- hprc_eigenvec %>%
  filter(abs(PC1) > (mean(PC1)+2*sd(PC1)) | abs(PC2)>mean(PC2)+2*sd(PC2))
hprc_pca <- hprc_eigenvec %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=PC1, y=PC2, color=hprc_meta_population, shape = hprc_meta_population)) +
  #ggrepel::geom_label_repel(data=filter(hprc_eigenvec, sample_id %in% c("AG18356_6", "AG16618_12")), mapping = aes(label=sample_id)) +
  geom_point(size=2, stroke=1)+
  #ggrepel::geom_label_repel(data=hprc_eigenvec_outlier, aes(label=sample_id), show_guide = FALSE) +
  #ggrepel::geom_label_repel(aes(label=sample_id)) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = rep(c(21:24), 10)) +
  scale_color_manual(values =hprc_color) +
  guides(color=guide_legend(ncol=2), shape=guide_legend(ncol=2)) +
  labs(x=str_c("PC1 (", hprc_eigenval[1], "%)"),
       y=str_c("PC2 (", hprc_eigenval[2], "%)")) +
  theme_cowplot() +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.title=element_blank(),
        legend.box.background = element_rect(linewidth = 0.5),
        legend.position = c(0.6, 0.65),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        text = element_text(size=15)) +
  ggtitle("human")
hprc_pca

## PANPAN-PT
chimp_eigenvec <- read_delim(str_c("../truvari/mPanTro3/panpan-pt.concat.eigenvec"), delim = " ", col_names = c("sample_id", "junk", str_c("PC", 1:20))) %>%
  dplyr::select(-junk) %>%
  left_join(panpan_metadata %>% distinct(genome_name, common_name), by=c("sample_id"="genome_name"))
chimp_eigenval <- read_lines(str_c("../truvari/mPanTro3/panpan-pt.concat.eigenval")) %>%
  parse_double() %>%
  magrittr::divide_by(., sum(.)) %>%
  magrittr::multiply_by(100) %>%
  round(2)
chimp_pca <- chimp_eigenvec %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=PC1, y=PC2, color=common_name)) +
  #ggrepel::geom_label_repel(data=filter(chimp_eigenvec, sample_id %in% c("AG18356_6", "AG16618_12")), mapping = aes(label=sample_id)) +
  geom_point(size=3, stroke=1.5, shape=21)+
  #ggrepel::geom_label_repel(aes(label=sample_id)) +
  #scale_shape_manual(values = c(21, 22, 22, 22, 22, 23)) +
  scale_color_manual(values =c(panpan_color, "grey")) +
  labs(x=str_c("PC1 (", chimp_eigenval[1], "%)"),
       y=str_c("PC2 (", chimp_eigenval[2], "%)")) +
  theme_cowplot() +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.title=element_blank(),
        legend.box.background = element_rect(linewidth = 0.5),
        legend.position = c(0.27, 0.25),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        text = element_text(size=15)) +
  ggtitle("chimpanzee")
chimp_pca
```

```{r fig.height=4.5, fig.width=12}
combined_pca_plot <- plot_grid(hprc_pca,
                               chimp_pca,
                               align = "vh",
                               nrow = 1)
combined_pca_plot
ggsave("../figures/combined_sv_pca.pdf", combined_pca_plot, width=12, height=4.5)
```

## Intersection with genes with vep

#### run vep

```{bash eval=FALSE}
## ht2t, we used an older annotation file first, which caused some issues. we are now switching to the new one, but Joana did the processing, so I'll start from there
/global/scratch/users/joana_rocha/PANPAN/reference/human_T2T/ncbi_dataset/data/GCF_009914755.1/genomic.gff
#/global/scratch/users/joana_rocha/PANPAN/reference/human_T2T/GCF_009914755.1_T2T-CHM13v2.0_genomic.gff
## mPanPan1
/global/scratch/users/joana_rocha/PANPAN/PANPAN_graph/pangene/mPanPan1_reference_proteins/mPanPan1_modified_chrom_alias.gtf
## mPanTro3
/global/scratch/users/joana_rocha/PANPAN/PANPAN_graph/pangene/mPanTro3_reference_proteins/mPanTro3_modified_chrom_alias.gtf

## ht2t
conda activate ensembl-vep-113.3
cd /global/scratch/users/nicolas931010/sv_detection
mkdir -p vep/ht2t
#grep -v "#" /global/scratch/users/joana_rocha/PANPAN/reference/human_T2T/GCF_009914755.1_T2T-CHM13v2.0_genomic.gff | sort -k1,1 -k4,4n -k5,5n -t$'\t' | bgzip -c > vep/ht2t/ht2t.gff.gz
#tabix -p gff -C vep/ht2t/ht2t.gff.gz
cp /global/scratch/users/joana_rocha/PANPAN/PANPAN_snvs/vep_snvs/ht2t/ht2t.gff.gz vep/ht2t/
tabix -p gff -C vep/ht2t/ht2t.gff.gz
vep -i truvari/ht2t/hprc.concat.vcf.gz -o vep/ht2t/hprc.concat.vcf.txt --fork 32 --custom file=vep/ht2t/ht2t.gff.gz,short_name=ht2t,format=gff,type=overlap --fasta reference/ht2t.fasta --force_overwrite  &> vep/ht2t/hprc.concat.vcf.log
vep -i concat_vcf/ht2t/final3~ht2t.vcf.gz -o vep/ht2t/hprc.large_svs.vcf.txt --fork 32 --custom file=vep/ht2t/ht2t.gff.gz,short_name=ht2t,format=gff,type=overlap --fasta reference/ht2t.fasta --force_overwrite  &> vep/ht2t/hprc.large_svs.vcf.log

## mPanTro3
mkdir -p vep/mPanTro3
grep -v "#" /global/scratch/users/joana_rocha/PANPAN/PANPAN_graph/pangene/mPanTro3_reference_proteins/mPanTro3_modified_chrom_alias.gtf | sort -k1,1 -k4,4n -k5,5n -t$'\t' | bgzip -c > vep/mPanTro3/mPanTro3.gtf.gz
tabix -p gff -C vep/mPanTro3/mPanTro3.gtf.gz
vep -i truvari/mPanTro3/lifted_panpan-pt.concat.vcf.gz -o vep/mPanTro3/panpan-pt.concat.vcf.txt --fork 32 --custom file=vep/mPanTro3/mPanTro3.gtf.gz,short_name=mPanTro3,format=gtf,type=overlap --fasta /global/scratch/users/joana_rocha/PANPAN/reference/primates_T2T/mPanTro3/mPanTro3.pri.cur.20231122.fasta --force_overwrite  &> vep/mPanTro3/panpan-pt.concat.vcf.log
vep -i concat_vcf/mPanTro3/final3~mPanTro3.vcf.gz -o vep/mPanTro3/panpan-pt.large_svs.vcf.txt --fork 32 --custom file=vep/mPanTro3/mPanTro3.gtf.gz,short_name=mPanTro3,format=gtf,type=overlap --fasta /global/scratch/users/joana_rocha/PANPAN/reference/primates_T2T/mPanTro3/mPanTro3.pri.cur.20231122.fasta --force_overwrite  &> vep/mPanTro3/panpan-pt.large_svs.vcf.log

## mPanPan1
mkdir -p vep/mPanPan1
grep -v "#" /global/scratch/users/joana_rocha/PANPAN/PANPAN_graph/pangene/mPanPan1_reference_proteins/mPanPan1_modified_chrom_alias.gtf | sort -k1,1 -k4,4n -k5,5n -t$'\t' | bgzip -c > vep/mPanPan1/mPanPan1.gtf.gz
tabix -p gff -C vep/mPanPan1/mPanPan1.gtf.gz
vep -i truvari/mPanPan1/panpan-pp.concat.vcf.gz -o vep/mPanPan1/panpan-pp.concat.vcf.txt --fork 32 --custom file=vep/mPanPan1/mPanPan1.gtf.gz,short_name=mPanPan1,format=gtf,type=overlap --fasta reference/mPanPan1.fasta --force_overwrite  &> vep/mPanPan1/panpan-pp.concat.vcf.log
vep -i concat_vcf/mPanPan1/final3~mPanPan1.vcf.gz -o vep/mPanPan1/panpan-pp.large_svs.vcf.txt --fork 32 --custom file=vep/mPanPan1/mPanPan1.gtf.gz,short_name=mPanPan1,format=gtf,type=overlap --fasta reference/mPanPan1.fasta --force_overwrite  &> vep/mPanPan1/panpan-pp.large_svs.vcf.log
```

#### wrangle the result

```{r eval=FALSE}
## human
vep_human <- read_tsv("../vep/ht2t/hprc.concat.vcf.txt", comment = "##") %>% 
  clean_names() %>%
  # bind_rows(read_tsv("../vep/ht2t/hprc.large_svs.vcf.txt", comment = "##") %>% clean_names()) %>%
  filter(!str_detect(number_uploaded_variation, "BND")) %>%
  separate_rows(extra, sep = ";") %>%
  separate(extra, into = c("key", "value"), sep = "=", fill = "right") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = key, values_from = value) %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  mutate(impact=fct_relevel(impact, c("HIGH", "MODERATE", "LOW", "MODIFIER"))) %>%
  mutate(species="human")
gff_human <- read_tsv("../vep/ht2t/ht2t.gff.gz", comment = "#", col_names = FALSE) %>%
  filter(X3 %in% c("gene"), str_detect(X9, "gene_biotype=protein_coding")) %>% 
  mutate(index=row_number()) %>%
  dplyr::select(index, X2, X3, X9) %>%
  separate_rows(X9, sep = ";") %>%
  separate(X9, into = c("key", "value"), sep = "=") %>%
  filter(key %in% c("Dbxref", "ID", "Name", "description")) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = key, values_from = value) %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  dplyr::select(-index) %>%
  mutate(gene=str_remove(dbxref, ".*GeneID:") %>% str_remove(",.*")) %>%
  dplyr::rename(annotation_tool=x2, type=x3) %>%
  filter(!str_detect(description, "non-protein coding"),
         !(str_detect(name, "^LOC") & is.na(description)),
         !(str_detect(name, "^LOC") & str_detect(description, regex("uncharacterized", ignore_case = TRUE))),
         !(str_detect(name, "^LOC") & str_detect(description, "uncharaterized")))
vep_human_by_gene <- vep_human %>%
  filter(gene != "-") %>%
  separate_rows(consequence, sep = ",") %>%
  distinct(gene, impact, consequence, species, number_uploaded_variation) %>%
  ##filter(gene=="100288069") %>%
  ## this is to only include variants that have the highest impact for each gene, and its functional consequences (it may be mix for high and low impact consequences)
  filter(impact==sort(unique(impact))[1], .by=c(species, gene)) %>%
  summarise(consequence=str_c(unique(consequence), collapse = ","), variant_id=str_c(unique(number_uploaded_variation), collapse = ","), impact=sort(impact)[1], .by=c(species, gene)) %>%
  inner_join(gff_human, by="gene")
vep_human_by_gene_filtered <- vep_human_by_gene %>%
  #filter(impact=="HIGH") %>%
  dplyr::select(species, type, name, description, impact, consequence, variant_id) %>%
  # filter(!(str_detect(name, "^LOC") & is.na(description)),
  #        !(str_detect(name, "^LOC") & str_detect(description, "^uncharacterized")),
  #        !(str_detect(name, "^LOC") & str_detect(description, "^putatively uncharacterized")),
  #        !(str_detect(name, "^LOC") & str_detect(description, "spliceosomal RNA")),
  #        !(str_detect(name, "^LOC") & str_detect(description, "small") & str_detect(description, "RNA")),
  #        !str_detect(name, "^TRNA"),
  #        !str_detect(name, "^LINC"),
  #        !str_detect(name, "^SNORA"),
  #        !str_detect(name, "^RNA5S"),
  #        !str_detect(description, "ribosomal RNA$"),
  #        !str_detect(description, "^microRNA"),
  #        type=="gene") %>%
  distinct()
## chimp
vep_chimp <- read_tsv("../vep/mPanTro3/panpan-pt.concat.vcf.txt", comment = "##") %>% 
  clean_names() %>%
  filter(!str_detect(number_uploaded_variation, "BND")) %>%
  separate_rows(extra, sep = ";") %>%
  separate(extra, into = c("key", "value"), sep = "=", fill = "right") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = key, values_from = value) %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  mutate(impact=fct_relevel(impact, c("HIGH", "MODERATE", "LOW", "MODIFIER"))) %>%
  mutate(species="chimpanzee")
gtf_chimp <- read_tsv("../vep/mPanTro3/mPanTro3.gtf.gz", comment = "#", col_names = FALSE) %>%
  filter(X3 %in% c("gene"), str_detect(X9, "gene_biotype \"protein_coding\"")) %>% 
  mutate(index=row_number()) %>%
  dplyr::select(index, X2, X3, X9) %>%
  separate_rows(X9, sep = "; ") %>%
  separate(X9, into = c("key", "value"), sep = " ", extra = "merge") %>%
  mutate(value=str_remove_all(value, "\"")) %>%
  filter(key %in% c("gene_id", "description")) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = key, values_from = value) %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  dplyr::select(-index) %>%
  #mutate(gene=str_remove(dbxref, ".*GeneID:") %>% str_remove(",.*")) %>%
  dplyr::rename(gene=gene_id, annotation_tool=x2, type=x3) %>%
  filter(!str_detect(description, "non-protein coding"),
         !(str_detect(gene, "^LOC") & is.na(description)),
         !(str_detect(gene, "^LOC") & str_detect(description, regex("uncharacterized", ignore_case = TRUE))))
vep_chimp_by_gene <- vep_chimp %>%
  filter(gene != "-") %>%
  separate_rows(consequence, sep = ",") %>%
  distinct(gene, impact, consequence, species, number_uploaded_variation) %>%
  filter(impact==sort(unique(impact))[1], .by=c(species, gene)) %>%
  summarise(consequence=str_c(unique(consequence), collapse = ","), variant_id=str_c(unique(number_uploaded_variation), collapse = ","), impact=sort(impact)[1], .by=c(species, gene)) %>%
  inner_join(gtf_chimp, by="gene") 
vep_chimp_by_gene_filtered <- vep_chimp_by_gene %>%
  #filter(impact=="HIGH") %>%
  dplyr::select(species, type, gene, description, impact, consequence, variant_id) %>%
  dplyr::rename(name=gene) %>%
  # filter(!(str_detect(name, "^LOC") & is.na(description)),
  #        !(str_detect(name, "^LOC") & str_detect(description, "^uncharacterized")),
  #        !(str_detect(name, "^LOC") & str_detect(description, "^putatively uncharacterized")),
  #        !(str_detect(name, "^LOC") & str_detect(description, "spliceosomal RNA")),
  #        !(str_detect(name, "^LOC") & str_detect(description, "small") & str_detect(description, "RNA")),
  #        !str_detect(name, "^TRNA"),
  #        !str_detect(name, "^LINC"),
  #        !str_detect(name, "^SNORA"),
  #        !str_detect(name, "^RNA5S"),
  #        !str_detect(description, "ribosomal RNA$"),
  #        !str_detect(description, "^microRNA"),
  #        type=="gene") %>%
  distinct()
## bonobo
vep_bonobo <- read_tsv("../vep/mPanPan1/panpan-pp.concat.vcf.txt", comment = "##") %>% 
  clean_names() %>%
  filter(!str_detect(number_uploaded_variation, "BND")) %>%
  separate_rows(extra, sep = ";") %>%
  separate(extra, into = c("key", "value"), sep = "=", fill = "right") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = key, values_from = value) %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  mutate(impact=fct_relevel(impact, c("HIGH", "MODERATE", "LOW", "MODIFIER"))) %>%
  mutate(species="bonobo")
gtf_bonobo <- read_tsv("../vep/mPanPan1/mPanPan1.gtf.gz", comment = "#", col_names = FALSE) %>%
  filter(X3 %in% c("gene"), str_detect(X9, "gene_biotype \"protein_coding\"")) %>% 
  mutate(index=row_number()) %>%
  dplyr::select(index, X2, X3, X9) %>%
  separate_rows(X9, sep = "; ") %>%
  separate(X9, into = c("key", "value"), sep = " ", extra = "merge") %>%
  mutate(value=str_remove_all(value, "\"")) %>%
  filter(key %in% c("gene_id", "description")) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = key, values_from = value) %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  dplyr::select(-index) %>%
  #mutate(gene=str_remove(dbxref, ".*GeneID:") %>% str_remove(",.*")) %>%
  dplyr::rename(gene=gene_id, annotation_tool=x2, type=x3) %>%
  filter(!str_detect(description, "non-protein coding"),
         !(str_detect(gene, "^LOC") & is.na(description)),
         !(str_detect(gene, "^LOC") & str_detect(description, regex("uncharacterized", ignore_case = TRUE))))
vep_bonobo_by_gene <- vep_bonobo %>%
  filter(gene != "-") %>%
  separate_rows(consequence, sep = ",") %>%
  distinct(gene, impact, consequence, species, number_uploaded_variation) %>%
  filter(impact==sort(unique(impact))[1], .by=c(species, gene)) %>%
  summarise(consequence=str_c(unique(consequence), collapse = ","), variant_id=str_c(unique(number_uploaded_variation), collapse = ","), impact=sort(impact)[1], .by=c(species, gene)) %>%
  inner_join(gtf_bonobo, by="gene")
vep_bonobo_by_gene_filtered <- vep_bonobo_by_gene %>%
  #filter(impact=="HIGH") %>%
  dplyr::select(species, type, gene, description, impact, consequence, variant_id) %>%
  dplyr::rename(name=gene) %>%
  # filter(!(str_detect(name, "^LOC") & is.na(description)),
  #        !(str_detect(name, "^LOC") & str_detect(description, "^uncharacterized")),
  #        !(str_detect(name, "^LOC") & str_detect(description, "^putatively uncharacterized")),
  #        !(str_detect(name, "^LOC") & str_detect(description, "spliceosomal RNA")),
  #        !(str_detect(name, "^LOC") & str_detect(description, "small") & str_detect(description, "RNA")),
  #        !str_detect(name, "^TRNA"),
  #        !str_detect(name, "^LINC"),
  #        !str_detect(name, "^SNORA"),
  #        !str_detect(name, "^RNA5S"),
  #        !str_detect(description, "ribosomal RNA$"),
  #        !str_detect(description, "^microRNA"),
  #        type=="gene") %>%
  distinct()
vep_all_species_by_gene_wide <- vep_human_by_gene_filtered %>% 
  dplyr::select(species, name, description, impact) %>%
  bind_rows(vep_chimp_by_gene_filtered %>% dplyr::select(species, name, description, impact)) %>%
  bind_rows(vep_bonobo_by_gene_filtered %>% dplyr::select(species, name, description, impact)) %>%
  #filter(str_detect(name, "^LOC")) %>% 
  #filter(dplyr::n()>1, .by=name)
  dplyr::select(-description) %>%
  mutate(impact=(5-as.numeric(impact))) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = species, values_from = impact, values_fill = 0) %>%
  left_join(gff_human %>% filter(!is.na(description)) %>% dplyr::select(name, description) %>% distinct()) %>%
  left_join(gtf_chimp %>% filter(!is.na(description)) %>% transmute(name=gene, description_chimp=description) %>% distinct()) %>%
  left_join(gtf_bonobo %>% filter(!is.na(description)) %>% transmute(name=gene, description_bonobo=description) %>% distinct()) %>%
  mutate(description=ifelse(is.na(description), description_chimp, description),
         description=ifelse(is.na(description), description_bonobo, description),) %>%
  dplyr::select(-description_chimp, -description_bonobo)
vep_all_species_by_gene_wide %>%
  mutate(human=human>0, chimpanzee=chimpanzee>0, bonobo=bonobo>0) %>%
  count(human, chimpanzee, bonobo)
vep_all_species_by_gene_wide %>%
  mutate(human=human>1, chimpanzee=chimpanzee>1, bonobo=bonobo>1) %>%
  count(human, chimpanzee, bonobo)
vep_all_species_by_gene_wide %>%
  filter((human>3)+(chimpanzee>3)+(bonobo>3)>1)%>%
  arrange(name)
vep_all_species_by_gene_wide %>%
  filter((human>1)+(chimpanzee>1)+(bonobo>1)>2) 
```

#### output the gene table

```{r eval=FALSE}
vep_all_species_by_gene_wide %>%
  write_tsv("../vep/gene_impact_wide.tsv")
vep_all_species_by_gene_wide %>%
  filter((human>3)+(chimpanzee>3)+(bonobo>3)>1) %>%
  arrange(name) %>%
  write_csv("../docs/genes_impacted_by_svs_shared_across_species.csv")
disease_info_old <- read_csv("../docs/JR_genes_impacted_by_svs_shared_across_species.csv") %>%
  dplyr::select(name, diseases, other)
vep_all_species_by_gene_wide %>%
  filter((human>3)+(chimpanzee>3)+(bonobo>3)>1) %>%
  left_join(disease_info_old) %>% 
  arrange(name) %>%
  write_csv("../docs/genes_impacted_by_svs_shared_across_species_with_desease_info.csv")
```

#### output the SV table

```{r eval=FALSE}
genes_impacted_by_svs_shared_across_species_long <- vep_all_species_by_gene_wide %>%
  filter((human>3)+(chimpanzee>3)+(bonobo>3)>1) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols=2:4, values_to = "impact", names_to = "species") %>%
  filter(impact==4)
vcf_for_vep_join <- vcf_annotated_combined %>%
  mutate(end_from_svlen=ifelse(svtype=="INS", pos, pos+abs(svlen))) %>%
  mutate(end=ifelse(!is.na(end), end, end_from_svlen), id) %>%
  dplyr::select(id, chrom, pos, end, svtype, svlen, total_allele_count, allele_frequency, type_simplified, species)
high_impact_svs_on_shared_genes <- bind_rows(vep_bonobo, vep_chimp, vep_human %>% left_join(gff_human %>% distinct(gene, name)) %>% mutate(gene=name) %>% dplyr::select(-name)) %>% 
  filter(impact=="HIGH") %>% 
  transmute(species, gene, id=number_uploaded_variation, feature, consequence) %>%
  group_by(species, gene, id) %>%
  summarise(feature=unique(feature) %>% str_c(collapse = ","), 
            consequence=str_c(consequence, collapse = ",") %>% str_split(pattern=",") %>% lapply(unique) %>% map_chr(function(x){str_c(x, collapse = ",")})) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  semi_join(genes_impacted_by_svs_shared_across_species_long, by=c("gene"="name", "species")) %>%
  left_join(vcf_for_vep_join, by=c("id", "species"))
high_impact_svs_on_shared_genes %>%
  write_csv("../docs/high_impact_svs_on_shared_genes.csv")

high_impact_svs_on_shared_genes %>%
  count(gene, species) %>%
  #count(gene) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = species, values_from = n)
# distinct(species, gene) %>%
# mutate(value=1) %>%
# pivot_wider(names_from = species, values_from = value) %>%
# arrange(gene)
```

```{r eval=FALSE}
sv_impact_long <- bind_rows(vep_bonobo, vep_chimp, vep_human %>% left_join(gff_human %>% distinct(gene, name)) %>% mutate(gene=name) %>% dplyr::select(-name)) %>% 
  transmute(species, gene, impact, id=number_uploaded_variation, feature, consequence) %>%
  group_by(species, id) %>%
  filter(impact==unique(impact) %>% sort() %>% .[1]) %>%
  summarise(impact=unique(impact),
            gene=unique(gene) %>% str_c(collapse = ","), 
            feature=unique(feature) %>% str_c(collapse = ","), 
            consequence=str_c(consequence, collapse = ",") %>% str_split(pattern=",") %>% lapply(unique) %>% map_chr(function(x){str_c(x, collapse = ",")})) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  left_join(vcf_for_vep_join, by=c("id", "species"))
write_tsv(sv_impact_long, "../vep/sv_impact_long.tsv")
```

#### upset plot

```{r fig.width=3.5, fig.height=3.5}
vep_all_species_by_gene_wide <- read_tsv("../vep/gene_impact_wide.tsv")
upset_plot_df <- vep_all_species_by_gene_wide %>%
  mutate(human=human==4, chimpanzee=chimpanzee==4, bonobo=bonobo==4) %>%
  filter(human+chimpanzee+bonobo>0) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols=2:4, names_to = "species", values_to = "high_impact") %>%
  filter(high_impact) %>%
  group_by(name) %>%
  summarise(species=list(species)) %>%
  ungroup()
factor_levels =  c("Eastern", "Central", "Western x Central", "Western")
shared_genes_upset_plot <- upset_plot_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=species)) +
  geom_bar(fill="grey") +
  geom_text(data=count(upset_plot_df, species), mapping = aes(x=species, y=exp(log(n)/2), label=n), size=3) +
  scale_x_upset(n_intersections = 7) +
  scale_y_log10() +
  labs(y="number of named protein-coding genes\nhighly impacted by segregating SVs") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.title.y=element_text(size=11),
        text=element_text(size=15))
shared_genes_upset_plot
```

```{r eval=FALSE}
ggsave("../figures/highly_impacted_genes_upset_plot.pdf", shared_genes_upset_plot, height = 3.5, width = 3.5)
```

#### pLI correlation

the absent category is currently wrong, since genes not existing in the annotation file should be excluded. We may not need this anyways though, since sHet seems to be better.

```{r eval=FALSE, fig.width=6, fig.height=3}
#read_tsv("http://hgdownload.soe.ucsc.edu/gbdb/hg38/gnomAD/pLI/pliByTranscript.bb")
vep_all_species_by_gene_wide <- read_tsv("../vep/gene_impact_wide.tsv")
pli_vep <- read_tsv("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Ensembl/VEP_plugins/refs/heads/release/114/pLI_values.txt") %>%
  rename(name=gene)
## https://gnomad.broadinstitute.org/downloads#v4-constraint
pli_raw <- read_tsv("../vep/gnomad.v4.1.constraint_metrics.tsv")
pli <- pli_raw %>%
  filter(canonical, !is.na(lof.pLI)) %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, lof.pLI, lof.oe, lof.z_score, mis.z_score, syn.z_score) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  arrange(gene, lof.z_score, mis.z_score, syn.z_score) %>%
  slice_tail(by=gene) %>%
  rename(name=gene)
pli_of_sv_impacted_genes <- pli %>%
  left_join(vep_all_species_by_gene_wide, by="name") %>%
  mutate(human=ifelse(is.na(human), 0, human),
         chimpanzee=ifelse(is.na(chimpanzee), 0, chimpanzee),
         bonobo=ifelse(is.na(bonobo), 0, bonobo)) %>%
  mutate(category=case_when(human>1 ~ "impacted by SVs in humans", 
                            T ~ "unimpacted by SVs in humans"))
#   mutate(category=case_when(human>1 ~ "impacted by functional SVs in humans", 
#                             human==0 ~ "unimpacted by SVs in humans",
```
