```{r eval=FALSE, fig.width=6, fig.height=3}
#                             human==1 ~ "impacted by modifier SVs in humans"))
pli_of_sv_impacted_genes %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=lof.pLI, y=as.factor(human))) +
  ggridges::geom_density_ridges() +
  scale_x_sqrt() +
  scale_y_discrete(label=c("absent", "modifier", "low","moderate", "high"), name="impact level by SV") +
  theme_bw()
pli_of_sv_impacted_genes %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=lof.pLI)) +
  geom_histogram() +
  facet_wrap(~category, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_bw()
pli_of_sv_impacted_genes %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=lof.z_score)) +
  geom_histogram() +
  facet_wrap(~category, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1)
pli_of_sv_impacted_genes %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=lof.z_score, y=category)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_bw()
pli_of_sv_impacted_genes %>%
  ggplot(aes(fill=category, x=lof.z_score)) +
  geom_density(alpha=0.5) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "top") 

pli_of_sv_impacted_genes %>%
  slice_max(lof.z_score)
pli_of_sv_impacted_genes %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(max_impact=max(human, chimpanzee, bonobo)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=lof.pLI)) +
  geom_histogram() +
  facet_wrap(~(max_impact>1), scales = "free_y")
# vep_all_species_by_gene_wide %>%
#   anti_join(pli) %>% #arrange(desc(bonobo), desc(chimpanzee))
#   filter(human>0)
pli %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=mis.z_score, y=lof.z_score)) +
  geom_point()
```

#### length distribution of SVs with different impact levels

```{r fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
sv_impact_long %>%
  mutate(impact=fct_relevel(impact, c("MODIFIER", "LOW","MODERATE", "HIGH"))) %>%
  mutate(svtype=fct_relevel(svtype, c("INS", "DEL", "DUP", "INV"))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=abs(svlen), fill = svtype)) +
  geom_histogram(color="black", bins=50, linewidth=0.2) +
  scale_x_log10() +
  facet_grid(impact~species, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(x="SV length") +
  theme_bw()
sv_impact_long %>%
  mutate(type_simplified=fct_relevel(type_simplified, c("SINE/Alu", "LINE/L1", "Retroposon/SVA", "Simple/tandem repeat", "Other repeats", "Non-repeat"))) %>%
  filter(svtype %in% c("INS", "DEL")) %>%
  mutate(impact=fct_relevel(impact, c("MODIFIER", "LOW","MODERATE", "HIGH"))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=abs(svlen), fill = type_simplified)) +
  geom_histogram(color="black", bins=50, linewidth=0.2) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = pals::cols25(n=25)[c(1:3, 7, 8, 13)], breaks=c("SINE/Alu", "LINE/L1", "Retroposon/SVA", "Simple/tandem repeat", "Other repeats", "Non-repeat"), drop=FALSE) +
  scale_x_log10() +
  facet_grid(impact~species, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(x="SV length") +
  theme_bw()
```

#### SFS of SVs with different impact levels

```{r fig.height=3, fig.width=10}
sv_impact_long <- read_tsv("../vep/sv_impact_long.tsv")
# sv_impact_long %>% distinct(id, species) %>% dim()
# vcf_for_vep_join %>% distinct(id, species) %>% dim()
sv_impact_sfs_tmp <- crossing(species="bonobo", total_allele_count=1:(10-1), impact_simplified=c("modifier variant", "putatively functional variant")) %>%
  bind_rows(crossing(species="chimpanzee", total_allele_count=1:(48-1), impact_simplified=c("modifier variant", "putatively functional variant"))) %>%
  bind_rows(crossing(species="human", total_allele_count=1:94, impact_simplified=c("modifier variant", "putatively functional variant")))
sv_impact_sfs <- sv_impact_long %>%
  filter(species!="bonobo" | total_allele_count!=10) %>%
  filter(species!="chimpanzee" | total_allele_count!=48) %>%
  mutate(impact_simplified=ifelse(impact=="MODIFIER", "modifier variant", "putatively functional variant")) %>%
  count(species, total_allele_count, impact_simplified) %>% 
  left_join(sv_impact_sfs_tmp, .) %>%
  mutate(n=ifelse(is.na(n), 0, n)) %>%
  mutate(p=n/sum(n), .by=c(species, impact_simplified)) 
custom_x <- list(
  scale_x_sqrt(breaks = c(1, 5, 9)),
  scale_x_sqrt(breaks = c(1, (1:5)*10)),
  scale_x_sqrt((breaks = c(1, (1:4)*25)),)
)
sv_impact_sfs %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=total_allele_count, y=p)) +
  geom_line(aes(color=impact_simplified)) +
  geom_point(aes(color=impact_simplified), size=0.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(fill=impact_simplified, ymax=p), ymin=0, alpha=0.2) +
  scale_color_manual(values=MetBrewer::met.brewer(name="Homer1", n=8, type = "d")[c(8,2)]) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=MetBrewer::met.brewer(name="Homer1", n=8, type = "d")[c(8,2)]) +
  labs(x="number of non-reference alleles", y="proportion of SVs") +
  scale_y_sqrt() +
  facet_grid(.~species, scale="free", space="free_x")+
  facetted_pos_scales(x = custom_x) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "top", panel.grid = element_blank())
custom_x <- list(
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(1, 9)),
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(1, (1:5)*10)),
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(1, (1:4)*25))
)
sv_impact_sfs %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=total_allele_count, y=p)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill=impact_simplified), position=position_dodge(), color="black", linewidth=0.1) +
  #scale_fill_manual(values=MetBrewer::met.brewer(name="Derain", n=7, type = "d")[c(1,6)]) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=MetBrewer::met.brewer(name="Homer1", n=8, type = "d")[c(8,2)]) +
  labs(x="number of non-reference alleles", y="proportion of SVs") +
  scale_y_sqrt() +
  facet_grid(.~species, scale="free", space="free_x")+
  facetted_pos_scales(x = custom_x) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "top", panel.grid = element_blank())
```

## Segregating SVs in chimp

```{r eval=FALSE}
vcf_long_chimp <- vcf_long_chimp_tmp %>%
  left_join(panpan_metadata, by=c("indiv"="genome_name")) %>%
  mutate(common_name=str_remove(common_name, " chimpanzee"),
         common_name=str_remove(common_name, " hybrid"),
         common_name=fct_relevel(common_name, c("Western", "Western x Central", "Central", "Eastern")))
write_tsv(vcf_long_chimp, "../truvari/mPanTro3/vcf_long_chimp.tsv")
```

```{r}
vcf_long_chimp <- data.table::fread("../truvari/mPanTro3/vcf_long_chimp.tsv") %>%
  mutate(common_name=fct_relevel(common_name, c("Western", "Western x Central", "Central", "Eastern")))

vcf_long_chimp_by_species <- vcf_long_chimp %>%
  group_by(id, chrom, pos, ref, alt, svlen, svtype, end, common_name) %>%
  summarise(allele_count=sum(allele_count), sample_size=dplyr::n()) %>%
  ungroup()
```

#### SFS

```{r fig.width=10, fig.height=4}
vcf_long_chimp_by_species %>%
  filter(allele_count>0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=allele_count)) +
  geom_bar(aes(fill=common_name), color="black") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = panpan_color[c(3, 4, 1, 2)], name=NULL) +
  facet_grid2(svtype~common_name, scales="free", space="free_x", independent = "y") +
  theme_bw()+
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none")
```

#### upset plot

```{r}
upset_plot_df <- vcf_long_chimp_by_species %>%
  mutate(allele_frequency=allele_count/sample_size/2) %>%
  filter(allele_frequency>0) %>%
  group_by(id, chrom, pos, ref, alt, svlen, svtype, end) %>%
  summarise(population=list(common_name)) %>%
  ungroup()
factor_levels =  c("Eastern", "Central", "Western x Central", "Western")
upset_overriding_fn = function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(single_label = factor(single_label,levels = factor_levels ) ) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = at, y = single_label)) +
    geom_rect(aes(fill= index %% 2 == 0), ymin=df$index-0.5,
              ymax=df$index+0.5, xmin=0, xmax=1) +
    geom_point(aes(color= observed), size = 3) +
    geom_line(data= function(dat) dat[dat$observed, ,drop=FALSE],
              aes(group = labels), size= 1.2) +
    ylab("") + xlab("") +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), expand = c(0, 0)) +
    scale_fill_manual(values= c("#F7F7F7", "white")) +
    scale_color_manual(values= c( "#E0E0E0", "black")) +
    guides(color="none", fill="none") +
    theme(
      panel.background = element_blank(),
      axis.text.x = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.length = unit(0, "pt"),
      axis.title.y = element_blank(),
      axis.title.x = element_blank(),
      axis.line = element_blank(),
      panel.border = element_blank()
    )
}
upset_plot_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=population)) +
  geom_bar(aes(fill=svtype), color="black") +
  scale_x_upset(n_intersections = 20) +
  axis_combmatrix(sep = "," ,override_plotting_function = upset_overriding_fn ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_blank())

upset_plot_df %>%
  filter(svtype %in% c("INS", "DEL")) %>%
  inner_join(vcf_annotated_chimp %>% dplyr::select(id, type_simplified, divergence)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=population)) +
  geom_bar(aes(fill=type_simplified), color="black", position = "fill") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = pals::cols25(n=25)[c(1:3, 7, 5 , 8, 4, 11, 13)], breaks=c("SINE/Alu", "LINE/L1", "Retroposon/SVA", "Other Type I TE", "Type II TE", "Simple/tandem repeat", "RNA array", "Unknown", "Non-repeat")) +
  scale_x_upset(n_intersections = 20) +
  axis_combmatrix(sep = "," ,override_plotting_function = upset_overriding_fn ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(panel.grid.major.x = element_blank())
```

#### saturation plot

```{r}
## chimp
individual_order <- vcf_long_chimp %>%
  mutate(common_name=fct_relevel(common_name, c("Central", "Eastern", "Western", "Western x Central"))) %>%
  filter(allele_count>0) %>%
  count(indiv, common_name) %>%
  arrange(common_name, desc(n))
n_variants <- NULL
for (i in seq_len(nrow(individual_order))){
  individuals <- individual_order$indiv[1:i]
  n_variants_tmp <- vcf_long_chimp %>% 
    filter(indiv %in% c(individuals)) %>%
    group_by(id) %>%
    summarize(allele_frequency=sum(allele_count)/dplyr::n()/2) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    filter(allele_frequency>0) %>%
    nrow()
  n_variants <- c(n_variants, n_variants_tmp)
}
saturation_plot <- individual_order %>%
  mutate(index=row_number(),
         n_variants=n_variants, 
         indiv=str_extract(indiv, "^[^_]+"),
         indiv=as_factor(indiv)) %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_col(aes(x=index, y=n_variants, fill = common_name), alpha=0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = panpan_color[c(1, 2, 3, 4)], name=NULL) +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0,25), expand = expansion(mult = 0, add = 0.5)) +
  labs(y="cumulative number of SVs discovered", x="number of individuals") +
  theme(# axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90),
    # axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    # axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    # axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.position=c(0.3, 0.75),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill="transparent"),
    legend.box = "horizontal", 
    # legend.background = element_rect(color="black")
  )
```

```{r fig.width = 5, fig.height=3}
# human
individual_order_human <- vcf_long_human_tmp %>%
  filter(allele_count>0) %>%
  count(indiv) %>%
  arrange(desc(n))
n_variants_human <- NULL
for (i in seq_len(nrow(individual_order))){
  individuals <- individual_order_human$indiv[1:i]
  n_variants_human_tmp <- vcf_long_human_tmp %>% 
    filter(indiv %in% c(individuals)) %>%
    group_by(id) %>%
    summarize(allele_frequency=sum(allele_count)/dplyr::n()/2) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    filter(allele_frequency>0) %>%
    nrow()
  n_variants_human <- c(n_variants_human, n_variants_human_tmp)
}
human_data_for_saturation_plot <- individual_order_human %>%
  .[seq_len(nrow(individual_order)),] %>%
  mutate(index=row_number(),
         n_variants=n_variants_human)
# bonobo
individual_order_bonobo <- vcf_long_bonobo_tmp %>%
  filter(allele_count>0) %>%
  count(indiv) %>%
  arrange(desc(n))
n_variants_bonobo <- NULL
for (i in seq_len(nrow(individual_order_bonobo))){
  individuals <- individual_order_bonobo$indiv[1:i]
  n_variants_bonobo_tmp <- vcf_long_bonobo_tmp %>% 
    filter(indiv %in% c(individuals)) %>%
    group_by(id) %>%
    summarize(allele_frequency=sum(allele_count)/dplyr::n()/2) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    filter(allele_frequency>0) %>%
    nrow()
  n_variants_bonobo <- c(n_variants_bonobo, n_variants_bonobo_tmp)
}
bonobo_data_for_saturation_plot <- individual_order_bonobo %>%
  .[seq_len(nrow(individual_order_bonobo)),] %>%
  mutate(index=row_number(),
         n_variants=n_variants_bonobo)
p <- saturation_plot +
  geom_line(data=human_data_for_saturation_plot, mapping=aes(x=index, y=n_variants, color="Human"), linewidth=1.5) +
  geom_point(data=human_data_for_saturation_plot, mapping=aes(x=index, y=n_variants, color="Human"), size=2.5, fill="white", shape=21, stroke=1.5) +
  geom_line(data=bonobo_data_for_saturation_plot, mapping=aes(x=index, y=n_variants, color="Bonobo"), linewidth=1.5) +
  geom_point(data=bonobo_data_for_saturation_plot, mapping=aes(x=index, y=n_variants, color="Bonobo"), size=2.5, fill="white", shape=21, stroke=1.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#FF8C69", "#5C608A"), name=NULL) +
  ylim(c(0, 100000))
p
#ggsave("../figures/saturation_plot.pdf", p, width = 5, height=3, units = "in")
```

#### heterozygosity

```{r fig.width=5, fig.height=3}
het_human <-  vcf_long_human_tmp %>%
  filter(gt_gt %in% c("0/1", "1/0")) %>%
  count(indiv) %>%
  arrange(desc(n)) %>%
  mutate(species="human") %>%
  left_join(genome_size_table) %>%
  mutate(het=n/genome_size) %>%
  left_join(hprc_metadata, by=c("indiv"="id"))
het_human_summary <- het_human %>%
  mutate(afr=ifelse(hprc_meta_population %in% c("GWD", "ACB", "MSL", "YRI", "ESN", "MKK-HapMap", "ASW"), "Human AFR", "non-AFR")) %>% #count(afr)
  summarise(het=mean(het), .by=afr)
## PR00512 and PR00496A being suspicious?
het_chimp <- vcf_long_chimp_tmp %>%
  filter(gt_gt %in% c("0/1", "1/0")) %>%
  count(indiv) %>%
  arrange(desc(n)) %>%
  mutate(species="chimpanzee") %>%
  left_join(genome_size_table) %>%
  mutate(het=n/genome_size) %>%
  left_join(panpan_metadata, by=c("indiv"="genome_name"))
het_bonobo <-  vcf_long_bonobo_tmp %>%
  filter(gt_gt %in% c("0/1", "1/0")) %>%
  count(indiv) %>%
  arrange(desc(n)) %>%
  mutate(species="bonobo") %>%
  left_join(genome_size_table) %>%
  mutate(het=n/genome_size) %>%
  left_join(panpan_metadata, by=c("indiv"="genome_name"))
p_het <- het_chimp %>%
  bind_rows(het_bonobo) %>%
  mutate(common_name=str_remove(common_name, " chimpanzee"),
         common_name=str_remove(common_name, " hybrid"),
         common_name=fct_relevel(common_name, c("Bonobo", "Central", "Eastern", "Western", "Western x Central"))) %>%
  arrange(common_name, het) %>%
  mutate(indiv=as_factor(indiv)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=indiv, y=het)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill=common_name), alpha=0.8) +
  geom_hline(data=het_human_summary, aes(yintercept=het), linetype="22", linewidth=0.3) +
  geom_text(data=het_human_summary, aes(y=het+2e-7, label=afr, x=0.5), size=3, hjust=0) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#E9D7CB", panpan_color[c(1, 2, 3, 4)]), name=NULL) +
  labs(x="individual", y="SV heterozygosity") +
  ylim(c(0, 5.2e-6))+
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x=element_blank(),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position=c(0.6, 0.75),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill="transparent"))
p_het
#ggsave("../figures/heterozygosity_plot.pdf", p_het, width = 5, height=3, units = "in")
## this is just for sanity checking
private_sv_chimp <-  vcf_long_chimp_tmp %>%
  filter(gt_gt != "0/0") %>%
  filter(dplyr::n()==1, .by = id) %>%
  count(indiv) %>%
  arrange(desc(n))
## write the data table for Joana
panpan_sv_het_table <- het_chimp %>%
  bind_rows(het_bonobo) %>%
  mutate(common_name=str_remove(common_name, " chimpanzee"),
         common_name=str_remove(common_name, " hybrid"),
         common_name=fct_relevel(common_name, c("Bonobo", "Central", "Eastern", "Western", "Western x Central"))) %>%
  arrange(common_name, het) %>%
  mutate(indiv=as_factor(indiv))
write.table(panpan_sv_het_table, "", quote = FALSE, row.names = FALSE, sep = "\t")
```

#### sharing of variant effect on the variant level

```{r eval=FALSE}
variant_level_sharing <- sv_impact_long %>%
  filter(species=="chimpanzee") %>%
  dplyr::select(-species) %>%
  left_join(vcf_long_chimp_by_species %>% dplyr::select(id, common_name, allele_count, sample_size), ., by="id") %>%
  filter(impact=="HIGH") 
write_tsv(variant_level_sharing, "../vep/mPanTro3/high_impact_variant_by_subspecies.tsv")
```

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=4}
variant_level_sharing <- read_tsv("../vep/mPanTro3/high_impact_variant_by_subspecies.tsv") %>%
  mutate(svtype=fct_relevel(svtype, c("INS", "DEL", "DUP", "INV")))

# left_join(gtf_chimp %>% filter(!is.na(description)) %>% distinct())
variant_level_sharing_filtered <- variant_level_sharing %>%
  filter(allele_count>0, allele_count<(sample_size*2)) 
upset_plot_df <- variant_level_sharing_filtered %>%
  group_by(id, svtype) %>%
  summarise(population=list(common_name)) %>%
  ungroup() 
chimp_high_impact_variant_upset_plot <- upset_plot_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=population)) +
  geom_bar(aes(fill=svtype), color="white", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_text(data=upset_plot_df%>%count(population), mapping=aes(x=population, y=n+20, label=n), size=3.5)+
  scale_x_upset(n_intersections = 20) +
  labs(y="number of segregating\nhigh-impact SVs") +
  axis_combmatrix(sep = "," ,override_plotting_function = upset_overriding_fn ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=MetBrewer::met.brewer(name="Derain", n=4, type="discrete"), name="SV type", ) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(position = "inside")) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 15) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.position.inside = c(0.85, 0.7))
chimp_high_impact_variant_upset_plot
# ggsave("../figures/chimp_high_impact_variant_upset_plot.pdf",chimp_high_impact_variant_upset_plot, width=6, height=4)


variant_level_sharing_wide <- variant_level_sharing %>%
  transmute(id, svtype, type_simplified, gene, common_name, allele_frequency=allele_count/sample_size/2) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = common_name, values_from = allele_frequency) %>%
  left_join(variant_level_sharing_filtered %>% count(id)) %>%
  arrange(desc(n))
# variant_level_sharing_wide %>%
#   filter(n==4) %>% View()
# variant_level_sharing_wide %>%
#   filter(svtype=="INV")

# vcf_long_chimp_by_species %>%
#   left_join(vep_chimp %>% transmute(gene, impact, id=number_uploaded_variation, feature, consequence))
# 
#   transmute(species, gene, impact, id=number_uploaded_variation, feature, consequence) %>%
#   group_by(species, id) %>%
#   filter(impact==unique(impact) %>% sort() %>% .[1]) %>%
#   summarise(impact=unique(impact),
#             gene=unique(gene) %>% str_c(collapse = ","), 
#             feature=unique(feature) %>% str_c(collapse = ","), 
#             consequence=str_c(consequence, collapse = ",") %>% str_split(pattern=",") %>% lapply(unique) %>% map_chr(function(x){str_c(x, collapse = ",")})) %>%
#   ungroup() %>%
#   left_join(vcf_for_vep_join, by=c("id", "species"))

```

#### sharing of variant effect on the gene level

```{r}
gene_level_sharing <- vep_chimp %>%
  filter(gene != "-") %>%
  separate_rows(consequence, sep = ",") %>%
  distinct(gene, impact, consequence, number_uploaded_variation) %>%
  inner_join(vcf_long_chimp_by_species %>% filter(allele_count>0, allele_count<(sample_size*2)) %>% transmute(number_uploaded_variation=id, common_name), ., relationship = "many-to-many") %>%
  filter(impact==sort(unique(impact))[1], .by=c(common_name, gene)) %>%
  summarise(consequence=str_c(unique(consequence), collapse = ","), variant_id=str_c(unique(number_uploaded_variation), collapse = ","), impact=sort(impact)[1], .by=c(common_name, gene)) %>%
  left_join(gtf_chimp, by="gene") %>%
  dplyr::select(-annotation_tool, -type)
gene_level_sharing_wide <- gene_level_sharing %>%
  dplyr::select(gene, description, common_name, impact) %>%
  mutate(impact=(5-as.numeric(impact))) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = common_name, values_from = impact, values_fill = 0) 
gene_level_sharing_wide %>%
  write_tsv("../vep/mPanTro3/gene_impact_wide_by_subspecies.tsv")
```
